name: Charlie Kirk, TPUSA
subject: We need to win this battle on the campuses
body:
By now, I’m sure you're as furious as I am with the White House’s absurd and illegal COVID vaccine mandate.
[View this message in your browser](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z11uol6acd544tosnisk6hut4kknh77mlks17nj0_rp22sh2s8i66pj1cpjm1ob2cph238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpqedtge1p7adjkm4qj7cbkmgor79hnmmrq8cjm62qb6t9nkjhf4onnmsqn2sbim8o77dr4mgojcoj0cuon1c3jc9h32pj765g71ppjm4qncsdkstireduie1p64pjgm9j71p5jcdg75d3661pbbd37m8p6cc3gm9h3csh5u)
[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z7kvsp1m87ffaua33cidi592liddcs8t0729avgg_rp22sh2s8i66pj1cpjm1ob2cph2bs) Fellow American, By now, I’m sure you're as furious as I am with the White House’s absurd and illegal COVID vaccine mandate. The federal government has **_NO POWER_** to get involved in your medical decisions. **__PERIOD_!_** But for millions of college students in America today, it’s not just the federal government they have to worry about. **In fact, more than 2,500 colleges and universities are __FORCING__ students to get the COVID vaccine... __DEMANDING__ that they publicly share their medical history... and __BANNING__ them from school if they don’t comply!** My friend, this is the pattern for vaccine mandates across America--including Joe Biden’s. And if we don’t stand up against it now, there’s no telling how aggressive the federal government will get in their quest to force this vaccine on you and me whether we want it or not. [**_That’s why Turning Point USA and our army of 400,000 student activists are leading the battle against forced COVID vaccines on campus. Will you stand with these students today by signing TPUSA’s National Open Letter Against Forced COVID Vaccinations?_**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z07vrh4l20ti4coapslres2t4eucmmar3rigdqd8_rp22sh2s8i66pj1cpjm1ob2cph2bs) [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z5079qrabhnnr1kqaq5517v0a72up1p3scc62i70_rp22sh2s8i66pj1cpjm1ob2cph2bs) To ensure that students are ready to win the fight for freedom against radical college administrations, we’ve launched a **“NO FORCED VAX”** campaign and created engaging and educational activism kits that we’re shipping out to students every week. [**Your signature right now will help complement that effort by showing these Leftist university administrators just how many Real Americans are opposed to their radical policies.**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zjmt8e9mohq4bc6ueblta5e6gcfg3embji7op0f0_rp22sh2s8i66pj1cpjm1ob2cph2bs) This move by the universities is not about vaccines **_AT ALL_**. It’s about freedom, choice, information, and constitutional rights. Young and healthy students —the least affected by the disease — must be free to decide what is best for them alongside their doctors... not college administrators or bureaucrats. The same goes for all Americans, but the Biden administration has watched what these universities have been able to get away with--and put their policies on steroids. As I write this email, thousands of students have been denied reentry to their campuses until they can show proof of vaccination. One student at Rutgers was even locked out of his __ONLINE__ college classes until he takes the vaccine! **If we let these schools exercise this kind of power over their students, I hate to see what the White House comes up with next!** We must win this campus battle right now, or we’ll be fighting it on our own doorsteps. [**Please partner with TPUSA _NOW_ in the fight against forced COVID vaccinations! With your signature on the National Open Letter today, you’ll help turn up the heat on these radical universities and stand with conservative students across America as they defend their freedom.**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z1gtm7ue4i0p9o7pns183v2q9a27m60h9rqmrmn8_rp22sh2s8i66pj1cpjm1ob2cph2bs) [**Stop Forced Vaccination!**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zrsakgbvagt1eui76fud0de7ef3054obslrjph9g_rp22sh2s8i66pj1cpjm1ob2cph2bs) Thank you for your support! For America, Charlie Kirk Founder & CEO Turning Point USA 4940 East Beverly Road
Phoenix, Arizona 85044

| | Hi Derek,

In these chaotic times, if you’re not paying attention to politics all the time, it’s hard to know what’s true.

I’ve been paying attention for a long time, and my friends in Virginia asked me to reach out to you today.

Terry McAuliffe’s opponent brags about his four-time endorsement by Trump — as if that were a good thing. This guy is spending millions of dollars of his own money to trash Terry, who is a popular, successful former governor.

**Terry McAuliffe has the knowledge, experience, and a proven record of fighting for quality education for everyone, expanding access to health care, and achieving economic success for Virginians.**

In Terry’s words, backed up by his prior action: “We've got to think big and be bold to create a better future for all Virginians. I'm ready to deliver that kind of leadership.”

****
The Trump-wanna-be is wrong for Virginians on every level. His name might as well be Glenn Trumpkin.

He’s promised to ban abortion and defund Planned Parenthood. And he spreads dangerous anti-vaccine rhetoric and has actually _encouraged_ Virginians not to get vaccinated.

That is not leadership.

**Terry McAuliffe is an experienced leader who’ll fight for the expansion of economic opportunities for all Virginians.**

Terry will fight for women’s access to reproductive health care. And he’ll fight for educators and students, health care workers, and all the folks who keep Virginia going.

**The choice is clear.**

Do you want someone who thrives on negativity and wants to suppress women’s reproductive rights?

Or do you want someone with a proven record of lifting Virginians?

**There’s a lot more work to be done, and Terry McAuliffe has the will and the skill to get it done.**

Derek, if you’re a person of any age, race, or gender who wants someone with a proven record of leading and inspiring Virginians with positive action to make a better world for everyone, I’m asking you to join me in helping Terry McAuliffe win this race.

clean_body: | | | = | | Hi Derek, In these chaotic times, if you’re not paying attention to politics all the time, it’s hard to know what’s true. I’ve been paying attention for a long time, and my friends in Virginia asked me to reach out to you today. Terry McAuliffe’s opponent brags about his four-time endorsement by Trump — as if that were a good thing. This guy is spending millions of dollars of his own money to trash Terry, who is a popular, successful former governor. Terry McAuliffe has the knowledge, experience, and a proven record of fighting for quality education for everyone, expanding access to health care, and achieving economic success for Virginians. In Terry’s words, backed up by his prior action: “We've got to think big and be bold to create a better future for all Virginians. I'm ready to deliver that kind of leadership.” = | | | = ** | = | | = | = | | = | = The Trump-wanna-be is wrong for Virginians on every level. His name might as well be Glenn Trumpkin. He’s promised to ban abortion and defund Planned Parenthood. And he spreads dangerous anti-vaccine rhetoric and has actually encouraged Virginians not to get vaccinated. That is not leadership. Terry McAuliffe is an experienced leader who’ll fight for the expansion of economic opportunities for all Virginians. Terry will fight for women’s access to reproductive health care. And he’ll fight for educators and students, health care workers, and all the folks who keep Virginia going. The choice is clear. Do you want someone who thrives on negativity and wants to suppress women’s reproductive rights? Or do you want someone with a proven record of lifting Virginians? There’s a lot more work to be done, and Terry McAuliffe has the will and the skill to get it done. Derek, if you’re a person of any age, race, or gender who wants someone with a proven record of leading and inspiring Virginians with positive action to make a better world for everyone, I’m asking you to join me in helping Terry McAuliffe win this race. = | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = I hope you and your family are well. Whatever you do, don’t give up. We’ll get through this. Wishing you all the best, -Carole = Carole King is a singer-songwriter, author, and activist. Her distinctions include a Grammy Lifetime Achievement Award and a Kennedy Center honor. Now Carole is using her platform to help Terry McAuliffe win in Virginia — and she actually did write this email. =** Terry McAuliffe for Virginia PO Box 26112 Arlington, VA 22215 If you would like to opt-out of future emails, click. body:
They still turn a blind eye
| | | | [](https://eliforcolorado.cmail19.com/t/t-l-ciitujt-ykykmujid-y/)

| | | Not only has the situation at the border not gotten any better, it actually continues to get worse. It is not humane, and it’s not American.
A new caravan of migrants is headed to the border right now— **adding tens of thousands more immigrants. **
[**We need COMMON SENSE Leadership. Someone with a backbone, someone who will take some accountability. Do you agree?**](https://eliforcolorado.cmail19.com/t/t-l-ciitujt-ykykmujid-t/)
Far-left Democrats like Michael Bennet and Joe Biden don’t want anything to change; they’re ignoring it. The only people they punished in the last month were border patrol agents.
**We need solutions. We have legal processes for a reason. This crisis is not good for migrants, it’s not good for American citizens, it’s not good for anyone. **
[**We need to send some common sense to Washington. That’s my plan. Help me get there.**](https://eliforcolorado.cmail19.com/t/t-l-ciitujt-ykykmujid-i/)

body:
Socialism appears to be on the rise in our country, especially among the young, and we want to understand the extent of that sup
| _Sponsored message_ |

| | |
---
| | This sponsored message from ICYMI News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z3bsuf7s2jum6hivqfq5aav6t4ivb6osvruvpvkg_rp22sh2s8i66pj1cpge4o36chh2bs)
---
| | | Dear Fellow American, Socialism appears to be on the rise in our country, especially among the young, and we want to understand the extent of that support. That’s why you have been selected by Hillsdale College to represent your state in a National Survey on Socialism. With your response, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans—views that we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. Every month, Hillsdale College is reaching millions of Americans with educational outreach. Your response to this National Survey on Socialism is essential in helping us form the most effective strategy in fighting for the future of our country. So please give your views on the political, media, and cultural forces that are promoting socialism in our country today, by completing this National Survey on Socialism: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/2021-national-survey-on-socialism/](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zafuav2cg9kh1dsugf56pivne6vru5jgm410jku0_rp22sh2s8i66pj1cpge4o36chh2bs)** There is no doubt in my mind that, especially among younger Americans, socialism is increasingly attractive—and that this threatens the future of American liberty. As Winston Churchill noted, “Socialism is the philosophy of failure, the creed of ignorance, and the gospel of envy.” And education is the surest way to defeat it. If you agree, please stand with Hillsdale College as we promote intelligent patriotism and defend liberty through education. Please represent your state and take the National Survey on Socialism today. | [**Take the Survey**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z8pg6jlp0ol6t0s24pd6abbtmseje865kq44da20_rp22sh2s8i66pj1cpge4o36chh2bs)
---
Warm Regards,
Larry P. Arnn

Derek, Terry laid out the stakes, plain and clear on Morning Joe this week. If Glenn Youngkin wins, _so does Donald Trump._

Donald Trump will use Virginia as the launchpad for his 2024 comeback. He wants to send the message that, despite his defeat in 2020, Trumpism is alive and well in our country.

But here’s the thing, Derek — as important as this race is for the future of Virginia and our country, election analysts are seeing Democratic enthusiasm plummeting.

As Terry told Joe and Mika:
**_“People need to wake up. I know we have elections every year in Virginia and people get tired, but this is very important.”_**
_– Terry McAuliffe, Morning Joe, 10/12/21_

name: National Republican Polling
subject: How should we elect the president?
body:
A movement is growing, led by progressives—but supported by many well-meaning Americans—to change the way we elect our presi
_Sponsored message_
This sponsored message from National Republican Polling is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2z27ejdqnime6537rtkb67g6k77ogm652dqtatiio_rp22sh2s8i66pj1cpgeaor2c3h2bs) Dear Fellow American, I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation’s future. A movement is growing, led by progressives—but supported by many well-meaning Americans—to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. That’s why Hillsdale College is conducting a **National Survey on Presidential Selection.** By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue—views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. You can complete the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** by using the link below: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zqa31fjk4jqgjb4jd9075qgqijmde9iitfufpjv0_rp22sh2s8i66pj1cpgeaor2c3h2bs)** For most of our nation’s history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government. **But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.** This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America’s schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics—too many Americans simply don’t understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty. Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching **millions** of Americans in all 50 states. These efforts, which aim to counter the Left’s domination over most of our schools, include:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as “Constitution 101” and “The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;”
* **Reaching** over 5.6 million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale’s free digest of liberty;
* **Promoting** constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;
* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America’s founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America, as well as to members of our armed forces; and
* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education through Hillsdale’s Barney Charter School Initiative, which launches and provides guidance to classical K-12 charter schools nationwide.

Your answers to the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty—including the importance of the Electoral College. **And this is especially important in this critical time for America’s future.** So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our **National Survey on Presidential Selection** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. **You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:** **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zht5c8squtt3gej3he0toas3siqrd0cssig1voa0_rp22sh2s8i66pj1cpgeaor2c3h2bs)** And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift. Since 1844, Hillsdale has been “pursuing truth and defending liberty.” Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts, while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work. Please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Presidential Selection today**. Thank you for your time and attention—and for your friendship and support of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

[](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zj3tn5n9oluqlhu2mifjjud4bsovm3k2vn2s8r3o_rp22sh2s8i66pj1cpgeaor2c3h238h5e8he49h666qbcdli6uon49fg)

I admit it, I had to voice my disgust over their desire to kill unborn babies. So, I followed them outside and screamed at them. **[You can see the video here.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58540286:6VCg0d2Nk:m:1:3253819041:AC16F512D12ECEFD81EA6DB63E11B916:r "You can see the video here.")** Democrats yelled back that I was rude while they celebrated the murder of unborn babies - but I don't care. I won't hold back anymore; I'm here to protect all Americans, born and unborn, and I won't let them get away with it. **[I will keep yelling, and I need every pro-life warrior on my team in this fight.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58540286:6VCg0d2Nk:m:1:3253819041:AC16F512D12ECEFD81EA6DB63E11B916:r "I will keep yelling, and I need every pro-life warrior on my
team in this fight.")** The Democrat's true agenda was unveiled this week - first, they voted to murder children, then Joe Biden weaponized the FBI to go after any parent who dares to object to their children begin taught Critical Race Theory or that "Heather has two mommies." **_They hate kids, they hate parents, and they hate America._** This radical leftist movement cannot be allowed to continue - their values are simply disgusting. They won't stop until our nation is destroyed. We can no longer be polite. If you stand with life, if you stand with morality, if you are about to have a Good Christian Meltdown of your own, **[you need to make the most generous donation possible to my campaign so I can defeat the ghoulish Democrats and their desire to kill unborn babies.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58540286:6VCg0d2Nk:m:1:3253819041:AC16F512D12ECEFD81EA6DB63E11B916:r "you need to make the most
generous donation possible to my campaign so I can defeat the ghoulish Democrats and their desire to kill unborn babies.")** The Democrats already hate me for filing articles of impeachment against Joe Biden and for fighting to protect your family and mine from their socialist agenda. My fight to preserve life will only _add fuel to their hateful fire, and that 's why I need you on my side. I cannot do this alone._ **[Please do all you can to help me keep fighting for life and America by donating all you can afford.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58540286:6VCg0d2Nk:m:1:3253819041:AC16F512D12ECEFD81EA6DB63E11B916:r "Please do all you can to help me keep fighting for life and

As _one of two congressional elections this November_ , **this seat is crucial to delivering President Biden’s agenda.** On the line is the relief that so many people desperately need from this pandemic, access to quality healthcare, fair wages and benefits for hard-working Americans, and more.

Shontel has always been a champion of the people and has never stopped fighting for us. [**_Help send Shontel to Congress in November by donating whatever you can now._**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37598909/311787284/1473364893?refcode=EM_FR_2110welcome2_W_SB4C_W_6_NG_N_l2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzg0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhZTFjMmI1NS04MTJlLWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FsDaEaJWpva3LMiAqVCB9HQ83na4mX4r6_eweScWRhE=)

Election Day will be here before we know it. We’re so glad we have strong grassroots supporters like you with us in this fight.

Together, we can do this!

Shontel Brown for Congress

As a Cuyahoga County Council member and Chairwoman of the Cuyahoga County Democratic Party, Shontel Brown has spent that last decade serving the people of Ohio and building coalitions. As the next Congresswoman for Ohio’s 11th District, she will fight for affordable quality health care, jobs that pay fair wages, a strong public education system, and equity and justice for all. **Will you join her and be the change we need?**

name: INDems HQ
subject: 200 Days: An Unacceptable Milestone
body:
Peter, 200 days. That's an unacceptable milestone for Hoosiers. Governor Eric Holcomb -- pressured by forces in his own party -- has continuously ignored solving the COVID-19 pandemic in Indiana. They don't want to start a statewide vaccine campaign and now Holcomb has gone _200 days_ without having a press briefing to update the families, workers, kids, elderly, college students, and visitors who just want to get back to normal. This is a once-in-a-century pandemic. Doing a simple press briefing to update Hoosiers is the least that could be done. It would provide everyone with an updated strategy on Indiana's fight against the pandemic so we can finally put COVID-19 in the rearview mirror. We're mad, Peter. But we will not give up holding the INGOP accountable. The more pressure we can put on Indiana Republicans, the more likely we are to get some action or movement on this issue of Hoosier public health and safety. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: I’m afraid Donald Trump is back.

Less than a year after grassroots donors and volunteers across the country delivered a resounding defeat to Donald Trump in the 2020 election, Trumpism has reared its ugly head once more — this time in Virginia.

clean_body: | | | = | | Hello Derek, I’m afraid Donald Trump is back. Less than a year after grassroots donors and volunteers across the country delivered a resounding defeat to Donald Trump in the 2020 election, Trumpism has reared its ugly head once more — this time in Virginia. Six times now, Donald Trump has announced a full-throated endorsement of Glenn Youngkin, the self-funding extreme Republican nominee for the Governor’s race who has already spent millions of his own dollars buying the primary election. = As we saw during the events of January 6th, leaving Trumpism unchecked in any corner of our country is not an option. It’s on us to fight back against the return of Trumpism. We must unite behind a proven leader like Terry McAuliffe, who has taken on Republican extremism before — and won. = Believe me — I know a dangerous, self-funding, Republican extremist when I see one. – Hillary | = Terry for VA PO Box 26112 Arlington, VA 22215 If you would like to opt-out of future emails, click. name: Rev. Robert A. Sirico
subject: How to save our culture from collapse
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Acton Institute
body:
Sadly, many classrooms in the United States are morally bankrupt.
[View this message in your browser](http://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2z0pddjbthq5mab25dcv6473dqhcvd6haun3u4600_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jkorr7djl69pn8cbkmdqj6drh6ej3fddnkgp7cc5kmdqjf972u9hfcdtjm1g6epbgsirr8srie1j3bdb3mjiefc5kmooe1oj6e9gr8t776qqncorj6urt4s3ic9j71cj6e3ib6or0eaq6cc3kmkoefdj3coor1cj26pp238h1e8he4933cpgmcp74c1j6aoh5u)

[](http://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zsjre3qs2efmh0leq226qtoeg2t6lmn013pvdblo_rp22sh2s8i66pj1cpie8o36clh2bs)

Friend,

The rise of Critical Race Theory and socialism being taught in the classroom has created a crisis for those who love our country, the Constitution, the ideas of liberty, and a moral society.

I am Father Robert A. Sirico and I serve as the President of the Acton Institute. _The Acton Institute is a pro-freedom religious non-profit organization that promotes the benefits of free enterprise to religious communities, business people, students, and educators_.

**In addition to the vocation God has given me to spread his message of salvation, I also have a mission to help people understand the importance of a free & virtuous society**. Free markets & limited government are meaningless without a moral and virtuous society.

Sadly, many classrooms in the United States are morally bankrupt.

Radical activists are teaching children to hate America and reject the ideas of liberty.

[**The Acton Institute is fighting back! We are providing educators with resources and materials to teach the ideas of liberty and common sense virtues in the classroom. You can support our efforts by making a donation of $20.22, $50, $100, $250, $500, $1,000 or any amount by clicking here.**](http://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2z6jd3fi96j8s9151sr4v8lgfgbj6kmabb2l7qbdg_rp22sh2s8i66pj1cpie8o36clh2bs)

This is an urgent crisis unfolding in school systems across the country.

You and I must support Pro-Freedom, Pro-Moral, and Anti-Socialist educators before they are wiped out of the education system entirely.

Your donation to Acton Institute enables us to provide resources to these educators, and empowers our organization to spread the message of liberty, free markets, and virtue in the media.

Our belief is that we must persuade those in our society who are most influential with everyday Americans.

Helping build a well-equipped, informed, and virtuous army of educators willing to stand up to Critical Race Theory and teach the values we love is worth fighting for. Please join the Acton Institute by using one of the links below to donate:

[**Donate $20.22 >>>
Donate $35 >>>
Donate $50 >>>
Donate $100 >>>
Donate $250 >>>
Donate $500 >>>
Donate $1,000 >>>
Donate $2,500 >>>
Donate Any Amount >>>**](http://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zvhs58dhaak5b7okmot72ntpqdp4p62m9kub5fmg_rp22sh2s8i66pj1cpie8o36clh2bs)

God has blessed us with talents, determination, and courage to reach the hearts and minds of influential leaders.

I have set a goal to raise $20,000 to support our outreach to educators and efforts to defeat Critical Race Theory. I'm praying you will consider sending a donation of any amount to support our efforts.

Friend, I believe you care about the ideas of liberty, love our country, and wish for a brighter future just as much as I do.

I urge you to take action for a virtuous and free society.

Help the Acton Institute spread our message and help America embrace freedom and morality.

**Doing nothing is not an option**. Eternity will judge us if we remain neutral in the face of our monumental moral and political crisis.

The battle for human freedom, the dignity of human life, and for a free society rages as you read this email. I implore you to participate in the future of our Republic and the education of the rising generation.

[**Here is the link to donate one more time.**](http://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zd6j0tok4jd965kh5fbckg8n4eclmigirfesg868_rp22sh2s8i66pj1cpie8o36clh2bs)

Thank you for everything.

Rev. Robert A. Sirico
President
Acton Institute

Paid for by the Acton Institute

body:
A recently released Senate report has revealed new information about Donald Trump and his allies' attempts to get the Justice Department to overturn the results of the 2020 election. Here's what you need to know: [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/37604433/311808604/-2023352048?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzkwMTkwIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImE0ZWU3MTU3LTg5MmUtZWMxMS05ODFmLWM4OTY2NTNiOTIwOCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=X3fWKAkdP-a5X-dOXzRdNt8W66CHcpSjXYR1WYI9uac=&emci=ca963c3a-c92d-ec11-981f-c896653b9208&emdi=a4ee7157-892e-ec11-981f-c896653b9208&ceid=16335001) Huge update, team.

A recently released Senate report has revealed new information about Donald Trump and his allies' attempts to get the Justice Department to overturn the results of the 2020 election. Here's what you need to know:
1. Chief of Staff Mark Meadows asked acting AG Jeffery Rosen to launch investigations based on false claims and conspiracy theories.

2. Trump allies Rep. Scott Perry, state Sen. Doug Mastriano, and legal advisor Cleta Mitchell had ties to the "Stop the Steal" movement and participated in the DOJ pressure campaign.

3. Trump forced a U.S. attorney to resign after he investigated and didn't substantiate claims of voter fraud in Georgia.

And that's just scratching the surface of the 394-page report.

Every day it becomes more clear that Donald Trump and his allies attacked our democracy in a shameless effort to hold onto power. If we're going to defend our democracy, we need to fight back right away.

**[Will you chip in before our mid-month deadline at midnight to help ensure that we defeat Trump's allies in Congress and ensure Trump never returns to office again?](https://click.everyaction.com/k/37604436/311808606/1657815061?refcode=em21_211016_mm3_fnd_gq_act___tna_ettx&utm_campaign=em21_211016_mm3_fnd_gq_act___tna_ettx&utm_medium=email&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzkwMTkwIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImE0ZWU3MTU3LTg5MmUtZWMxMS05ODFmLWM4OTY2NTNiOTIwOCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=X3fWKAkdP-a5X-dOXzRdNt8W66CHcpSjXYR1WYI9uac=)**

name: National Republican Polling
subject: For a limited time
body:
The events of the last year have no precedent in our nation’s history. They’ve shaken me, and I’m sure they’ve affected
_Sponsored message_
This sponsored message from National Republican Polling is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zsk49b7okaac1rl8eumdakjr68n697h6tb07d718_rp22sh2s8i66pj1cpie4o75c3h2bs) Dear Fellow American, The events of the last year have no precedent in our nation’s history. They’ve shaken me, and I’m sure they’ve affected you as well. Throughout it all, you may have noticed a recurring theme from the progressives in the media, Big Tech, and politics. They insist that the government designed by our Founding Fathers, as expressed in the Constitution, is **flawed** and **outdated** —not adequate for the challenges of our time. How should defenders of the Constitution, like you and me, respond to such charges? Well, a few early champions of the Constitution—Alexander Hamilton, John Jay, and James Madison—have given you the guide: _The Federalist Papers_. Written between October 1787 and August 1788 under the pen name Publius, _The Federalist Papers_ were originally published as newspaper editorials intended to explain the merits of the Constitution. Thomas Jefferson described _The Federalist Papers_ as “the best commentary on the principles of government which ever was written.” That means that defenders of the Constitution have no better help in understanding the principles of liberty underlying our Constitution than the words of the Founders themselves. **So, I’d like to send you our entire 10-lesson course, “ _The Federalist Papers_ ,”on DVD today with a donation of $100 or more to Hillsdale College.** _**“The Federalist Papers”**_ course comes in a beautiful DVD box set for viewing in your home or a small group. You might also find it useful for a homeschool curriculum or personal study. It’s taught by Hillsdale’s knowledgeable faculty and will deepen your understanding of this incredibly relevant document even more. The DVD can also make an excellent gift for a friend or family member unfamiliar with our nation’s founding principles of liberty. [](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zrik70cgl220gtv4hb9614b7mqia3787iu6ms6ho_rp22sh2s8i66pj1cpie4o75c3h2bs) Supplies are limited, though, so get this special edition of **_“The Federalist Papers”_** on DVD today. Given that more than 200,000 people have taken this course already, you can bet the DVD box set won’t last long. Click here to learn more about this DVD and order your copy of _**“The Federalist Papers”**_ today: [**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-federalist-papers**](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zd9mghaga3qjj484e0826obtsiijpqgf0981rps0_rp22sh2s8i66pj1cpie4o75c3h2bs) Warm regards, Bill Gray Class of 2001 Associate Vice President of National Donor Outreach Hillsdale College
---

name: Terry McAuliffe
subject: I’m sorry to bother you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH
body:
| | |

Team, I’m sorry to bother you, but it’s important. Early voting in the Virginia Governor’s race has already begun.**_ Recent polling shows my Trump-backed opponent Glenn Youngkin ahead, and it's coming at an awful time_**. Our fundraising has completely stalled out over the last couple of days, and I need your help so we can kick it into high gear before the November election. **[Please split a donation of anything you can afford between Maggie Hassan's and my campaign right now. Your contribution goes directly toward our efforts to turn out voters, defend Virginia’s progress, and stop Donald Trump.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37604539/311809156/1415752491?refcode=e20211016_trm-split&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNGRjZGRiNy04OTJlLWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BwDYhAXnm-WsFo_qbnA2dMexmCmXPc2_Su2sd7ufx7s=)** If you’re like me, you’re getting a lot of fundraising emails right now. For the last decade, Virginia Democrats have led the nation by delivering victory after victory for working families. Right now, all of that progress is under attack. If my opponent Glenn Youngkin becomes Virginia’s governor, he’ll roll back every inch we fought so hard for. Let’s be clear, Glenn Youngkin is a right-wing Trump acolyte. He wants to ban abortion, he pushes Trump’s big lie, and if he becomes Governor, he’ll put more guns on our streets. Moreover, Donald Trump has endorsed Youngkin six separate times. name: ICYMI News
subject: Your invitation to learn
body:
The events of the last year have no precedent in our nation’s history. They’ve shaken me, and I’m sure they’ve affected
| _Sponsored message_ |
---|---|---
This sponsored message from ICYMI News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zb59ic92mi7moklb6bm3rpu15r3goftcqtloj8l0_rp22sh2s8i66pj1cpie4o70sdh2bs) Dear Fellow American, The events of the last year have no precedent in our nation’s history. They’ve shaken me, and I’m sure they’ve affected you as well. Throughout it all, you may have noticed a recurring theme from the progressives in the media, Big Tech, and politics. They insist that the government designed by our Founding Fathers, as expressed in the Constitution, is **flawed** and **outdated** —not adequate for the challenges of our time. How should defenders of the Constitution, like you and me, respond to such charges? Well, a few early champions of the Constitution—Alexander Hamilton, John Jay, and James Madison—have given you the guide: _The Federalist Papers_. Written between October 1787 and August 1788 under the pen name Publius, _The Federalist Papers_ were originally published as newspaper editorials intended to explain the merits of the Constitution. Thomas Jefferson described _The Federalist Papers_ as “the best commentary on the principles of government which ever was written.” That means that defenders of the Constitution have no better help in understanding the principles of liberty underlying our Constitution than the words of the Founders themselves. **So, I’d like to send you our entire 10-lesson course, “ _The Federalist Papers_ ,”on DVD today with a donation of $100 or more to Hillsdale College.** _**“The Federalist Papers”**_ course comes in a beautiful DVD box set for viewing in your home or a small group. You might also find it useful for a homeschool curriculum or personal study. It’s taught by Hillsdale’s knowledgeable faculty and will deepen your understanding of this incredibly relevant document even more. The DVD can also make an excellent gift for a friend or family member unfamiliar with our nation’s founding principles of liberty. [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zvrp5oq1et4185jg5us9k5rn5fl62rgd7irvu320_rp22sh2s8i66pj1cpie4o70sdh2bs) Supplies are limited, though, so get this special edition of **_“The Federalist Papers”_** on DVD today. Given that more than 200,000 people have taken this course already, you can bet the DVD box set won’t last long. Click here to learn more about this DVD and order your copy of _**“The Federalist Papers”**_ today: [**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-federalist-papers**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z7n4g5a3q2nn7rueijlh4g2k6n0g6gs7bmiup58o_rp22sh2s8i66pj1cpie4o70sdh2bs) Warm regards, Bill Gray Class of 2001 Associate Vice President of National Donor Outreach Hillsdale College
---

name: Team Schiff
subject: The truth about this grassroots team
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by Schiff for Congress
body:
|
#
Derek, When Adam talks about this grassroots team, he means it when he says we have the power to swing elections. There aren’t many Democrats in the country like Adam — with a group of supporters and grassroots donors so large and strong, they can rightly claim to have helped take back the House, the Senate, and the White House. And you haven’t stopped since you helped sweep the GOP House majority out of power in 2018. And out of the White House in 2020. Or flipping Georgia blue in January 2021. You kept going and helped raise over $500,000 to help Gavin Newsom defeat the Republican-led recall by a massive margin. You’ve raised critical early money for Senate challengers. And more. Adam works every day knowing that his ability to pass legislation, defend democracy, and hold those who abuse their power accountable wouldn’t be possible without this grassroots team’s continued support — for which he’s incredibly grateful. And as we approach the upcoming midterm elections, Adam knows he can count on this team to help elect new and incumbent Democrats. To build our majorities in the House and Senate. And to beat the odds and Republican dark money. This team has been there with Adam for every election, and we’re counting on it again to stop the party of Trump and continue the hard-fought progress we’ve made these past few years. **Can you pitch in right now to fuel our work electing new and incumbent Democrats? body:
Democrats would lose the Senate if the election were held today
| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37605603/311813641/1575696346?amounts=250,100,50,25,5&refcode=jtk3437-fr-in&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDkvMS85MDA5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4YWIzODg3NC04YjJlLWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2EcqfX160CpdVEpAygZyf5DU1cCJ7JzzpLpjudsyLCQ=)
---
I won’t sugarcoat this, friend: Democrats would lose the Senate if the election were held today. Mitch McConnell is ONE seat away from retaking power, and a new poll shows me losing to my Trump-endorsed opponent in Nevada’s critical Senate race.
**With Senate control on the line, GOP groups have unleashed nearly $2 MILLION in attack ads against me. I'm being MASSIVELY outspent, and I need the resources to fight back. **
**I'm NOT on track to raise the $30,000 I need to fight back with just hours to go. Without your _immediate_ support, we could hand the Senate back to Mitch McConnell.**
**[Please, friend, I need your support to reach my $30,000 rapid-response goal before tonight’s midnight deadline. Will you chip in $5 right now to defend Nevada and our Senate majority?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37605604/311813642/1575696346?amounts=250,100,50,25,5&refcode=jtk3437-fr-in&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDkvMS85MDA5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4YWIzODg3NC04YjJlLWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2EcqfX160CpdVEpAygZyf5DU1cCJ7JzzpLpjudsyLCQ=)**
Friend, you’re a top Democratic supporter, so I want to give you the hard truth, even if it’s not easy to hear.
If I lose in Nevada, Democrats lose our razor-thin Senate majority and McConnell gets free rein to block our agenda. Progress would come to a _screeching halt_ on voting rights, health care, reproductive rights, combating climate change and all of our shared values.
**This new poll shows me behind by 2 points, and The Cook Political Report downgraded my chances of winning, so I CANNOT afford to fall short of a single fundraising goal.** But I'm dangerously behind on my crucial goal with just hours to go.
**[So I’m humbly asking you, friend: Will you rush $5 right now to help me defend our Democratic Senate majority? Your donation has never mattered more. ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37605605/311813643/1575696346?amounts=250,100,50,25,5&refcode=jtk3437-fr-in&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDkvMS85MDA5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4YWIzODg3NC04YjJlLWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2EcqfX160CpdVEpAygZyf5DU1cCJ7JzzpLpjudsyLCQ=)**
_¡La lucha sigue! _The fight continues!

Catherine
| | [CONTRIBUTE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37605606/311813644/1575696346?amounts=250,100,50,25,5&refcode=jtk3437-fr-in&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDkvMS85MDA5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4YWIzODg3NC04YjJlLWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2EcqfX160CpdVEpAygZyf5DU1cCJ7JzzpLpjudsyLCQ=)

body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37606002/311815484/-272948131?refcode=AU_MTH_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20211016_AM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1M2I5MDFlMy04YzJlLWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ddLMx64zYjZkInMyRtWmQMhK3IvzhvNkbP3j5f2jpE0=&emci=e04f79bd-fb2d-ec11-981f-c896653b9208&emdi=53b901e3-8c2e-ec11-981f-c896653b9208&ceid=252045)

Folks — it’s Cory Booker here. Martin’s one of my very good friends in the Senate and this Sunday is his 50th birthday. That’s why I’m emailing you! Will you join me in showing Martin how much his work in the Senate means to folks all across the country by helping us **bring in donations from every single U.S. state? That’s right, all 50!** **Let’s all pitch in — any amount counts — to show the support Martin has in your state. name: Save Warnock (via When Democrats Turn Out)
subject: Anti-Warnock donor says swastika is just “artistic protest”
disclaimer_text: Paid for by When Democrats Turn Out PAC
body:
|
---

| | Hi Peter, Hershel Walker— the ex-football player whose domestic violence and financial malfeasance rap sheet impressed even Donald Trump, who is all-in for Walker to replace Raphael Warnock in the Senate— just cancelled a $500-per-ticket fundraiser hosted by a longtime GOP donor whose Twitter profile picture featured a swastika made of COVID-19 vaccine syringes until just days ago. The donor said “I specifically chose that symbol as an artistic protest.” This is just the latest example that proves Hershel Walker has a blank check from hatemonger Donald Trump's riled up extremist base. CBS reports that in the first five weeks of his campaign, Walker has raised a jaw-dropping $3.7 million. Raphael Warnock poses such a serious threat to the GOP establishment that Republicans are running anybody they can find who can galvanize Trump's best friends: The Proud Boys. Remember, members of The Proud Boys have repeatedly threatened Warnock's life online, writing “Dead men can't pass laws.” The Proud Boys represent the only path forward for the Party of Trump. And if Herschel Walker successfully steals Warnock's Senate seat, Mitch McConnell will regain control of the Senate overnight. That means: Goodbye, gun reform. Goodbye, voting rights. Hello, emboldened Proud Boys. Hello, Trump 2024. But CNN recently declared Warnock 2022's #1 most vulnerable Democrat. Now, we're doing everything we can to re-elect Warnock, and hundreds of people have donated, but up against Trump & Co's millions, progressives are in for the electoral fight of our lives. We need absolutely everybody to go all-in to reelect Raphael Warnock. Please, there has never been a more important time to donate than RIGHT NOW. You stepped up time and again, BIG TIME, in 2020. But with the future of America hanging in the balance of the US Senate and Trump's pending return to politics, we're asking you personally: Please rush us $1, $5, $25, $100, anything you can spare right now. **[This cannot wait, Peter: Please, we need you to take a moment right now to chip in $5, $10, $25, or even more to protect Raphael Warnock, defend our fragile 50/50 Senate Majority, put Trump's hand-picked disaster artist back on the bleachers, and FINALLY get this country back on the right track.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/37606289/311816853/-1699842291?refcode=OUT_20211016_GEN_FDR_A&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg3NzQxIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjc5YTc3NjhjLThkMmUtZWMxMS05ODFmLWM4OTY2NTNiOTIwOCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=Ak-VILjB9h2i_44z1yY8Xti_YBUP94Ko1rYNWgFWcbo=)** | If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

Hello, emboldened Proud Boys. Hello, Trump 2024. But CNN recently declared Warnock 2022's #1 most vulnerable Democrat. Now, we're doing everything we can to re-elect Warnock, and hundreds of people have donated, but up against Trump & Co's millions, progressives are in for the electoral fight of our lives. We need absolutely everybody to go all-in to reelect Raphael Warnock. Please, there has never been a more important time to donate than RIGHT NOW. You stepped up time and again, BIG TIME, in 2020. But with the future of America hanging in the balance of the US Senate and Trump's pending return to politics, we're asking you personally: Please rush us $1, $5, $25, $100, anything you can spare right now. = | If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = | = | = | = | = | = Thank you for watching Raphael Warnock's back, Peter. name: GOP Presidential
subject: Survey on an urgent matter
body:
I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our natio
This sponsored message from GOP Presidential is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zh8eicl79ktk2kovll541s7mce628usam0r08qd0_rp22sh2s8i66pj1cpie2or0s3h2bs) Dear Fellow American,
I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter.
It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation's future.
A movement is growing, led by progressives--but supported by many well-meaning Americans--to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution.
That's why Hillsdale College is conducting a **National Survey on Presidential Selection.**
By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue--views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders.
You can complete the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** by using the link below:
**[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z4cu3898llojatop9t645jnjqrb0g5duogiap640_rp22sh2s8i66pj1cpie2or0s3h2bs)**
For most of our nation's history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government.
**But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.**
This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America's schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics--too many Americans simply don't understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty.
Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching **millions** of Americans in all 50 states.
These efforts, which aim to counter the Left's domination over most of our schools, include:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as "Constitution 101" and "The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;"
* **Reaching** over 5.6 million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale's free digest of liberty;
* **Promoting** constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;
* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America's founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America, as well as to members of our armed forces; and
* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education through Hillsdale's Barney Charter School Initiative, which launches and provides guidance to classical K-12 charter schools nationwide.

Your answers to the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty--including the importance of the Electoral College.
**And this is especially important in this critical time for America 's future.**
So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our **National Survey on Presidential Selection** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time.
**You can take the survey using this secure link I 've provided below:**
**[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zph49e5gcvaq6h0bs8sschatuak4lvvn7nqepepo_rp22sh2s8i66pj1cpie2or0s3h2bs)**
And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift.
Since 1844, Hillsdale has been "pursuing truth and defending liberty." Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts, while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.
The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work.
Please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Presidential Selection today**. Thank you for your time and attention--and for your friendship and support of liberty.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

name: Abby Finkenauer
subject: I really need your input, Peter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Abby for Iowa Abby for Iowa
body:
| | |
---
Peter, Sen. Grassley (R-IA) launched his reelection campaign just a couple weeks ago. This is where the rubber meets the road, and I need all hands on deck to build a campaign that can compete all the way to Election Day – and _win_.__**That's why, today, I'm asking you to participate in a digital focus group to help build out our strategy.**
Your feedback, here and now, couldn't be more important. Sen. Grassley will have the backing of the entire national GOP – including Donald Trump and Mitch McConnell's allies. The GOP Senate campaign arm already has a war chest of _$27.7 million_ dedicated to taking back the Senate and defeating competitive Democratic challengers like me. They're ready to pour millions into this race, and _we_ have to be ready to counter them.
But here's what I know: **If we come together – as a dedicated grassroots movement – and outwork Sen. Grassley and the GOP every step of the way, we will win.** After all, _this_ is our moment. Only 27% of Iowa voters say they want to reelect Sen. Grassley. But to defeat him, I'm counting on grassroots supporters like you to weigh in on our strategy by taking part in our digital focus group today.
**I'm meeting with my team at 10:45 a.m. tomorrow to look over our results and go through the top-lines and trends. We've set a goal of reaching 750 responses before then, but we haven't heard from you yet. As a valued member of our team, we need your input, Peter. **[Please,](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37606398/311817366/277988322?email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk284-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MzU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMjAzNmUzZi04ZTJlLWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=eK4BZ2c0jFQFgLOzU1Y_RELCUVnpHsm-k5l2PdHtJfk=&emci=ee1e401e-ac26-ec11-981f-c896653b9208&emdi=b2036e3f-8e2e-ec11-981f-c896653b9208&ceid=13784334)** **[**would you participate in our digital focus group now so that our campaign is best positioned to counter misleading attacks from Sen. name: Michele Rayner
subject: Let's talk abortion, Peter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Michele For Florida Michele For Florida
body:
|
---

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37607067/311819224/124312502?refcode=em21_emailheader&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MjI4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZDA2Y2YwNS05MTJlLWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-05Obed9sfcP9kYp6pPy_2Gd3DJ-3qk412xSJHm5g2I=)

Peter,

Let's talk abortion, y'all.

Last month, Texas passed near-total abortion ban legislation -- legislation that allows private citizens to sue abortion providers and anyone who helps a woman get an abortion, as well as completely banning abortions after 6 weeks of pregnancy. 6 weeks is well before many women even know they are pregnant.

We knew that if this could happen in Texas, that it could _damn sure_ happen in Florida. And just a few weeks later, Republican State Rep. Webster Barnaby filed a similar abortion ban in Florida that would prohibit abortions after 6 weeks.

**But let's be clear Peter: This isn't a Texas issue. This isn't a Florida issue. This is a national issue that requires _national_ leadership.**

These laws will disproportionately impact those constantly discriminated against in health care -- especially reproductive health care. Those people are Black women. Black women are constantly denied resources, services, and information needed to make personal decisions regarding our health.

We can't back down on this racial justice issue. We can't back down on this because access to abortion is health care. Access to safe abortion is health care.

**Peter, this is why I'm working tirelessly to become your representative -- so I can fight for autonomy over our bodies. So I can fight for the people who are too often left behind.**

[**Please join me in this fight for abortion access -- because this is about racial justice and ensuring that health care is a human right. clean_body: | = Peter, Let's talk abortion, y'all. Last month, Texas passed near-total abortion ban legislation -- legislation that allows private citizens to sue abortion providers and anyone who helps a woman get an abortion, as well as completely banning abortions after 6 weeks of pregnancy. 6 weeks is well before many women even know they are pregnant. We knew that if this could happen in Texas, that it could damn sure happen in Florida. And just a few weeks later, Republican State Rep. Webster Barnaby filed a similar abortion ban in Florida that would prohibit abortions after 6 weeks. But let's be clear Peter: This isn't a Texas issue. This isn't a Florida issue. This is a national issue that requires national leadership. These laws will disproportionately impact those constantly discriminated against in health care -- especially reproductive health care. Those people are Black women. Black women are constantly denied resources, services, and information needed to make personal decisions regarding our health. We can't back down on this racial justice issue. We can't back down on this because access to abortion is health care. Access to safe abortion is health care. Peter, this is why I'm working tirelessly to become your representative -- so I can fight for autonomy over our bodies. So I can fight for the people who are too often left behind. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = | = ---|--- = | = = | = I promise you Peter, there is no one that'll fight this fight as hard as I will. Join me. \-- Michele = *

The 2020 election was almost exactly a year ago, but the Big Lie is very much alive and well and worming its way into the 2022 midterms.
Just a few days ago, Trump himself proclaimed that “ _If we don’t solve the Presidential Election Fraud of 2020. . . Republicans will not be voting in ’22 or ’24. It is the single most important thing for Republicans to do._ ”
**Look, folks, the _only reason_ that the Big Lie is still a menace to our democracy is because of Republicans like Scott Franklin who voted to overturn a free and fair democratic election.**

| Peter,
Sorry to be emailing you again, but we needed to get this message out to as many people as possible.
Matt Gaetz has announced that he'll nominate Donald Trump as Speaker if the Republicans win back the House next year...and the left is already having a major meltdown.
They are targeting anyone who publicly supports Donald Trump through social media censorship and now through the ridiculous January 6th Investigation - a political tool being wielded against conservatives.
We need patriots like you to [step up](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Y2gqaQKkgya2exPoMneBNc2A2kn2nkYttdHgo_5nwSdozhvpIOlUE6SKKIDxfop5K2MTBlol9UNbVYhwwBOIuoMzvm5-p-NkQHoIiuKSE9fWtSYnCpw-5yDxCbBQ_-VOAoJMtmB1RnW2cFSiw7n8qztFi0NApwrpHVOv0aPDyWy-jA3ru8ap_K50nly2FPq7&c=hygRF06kSvcPiUDfawQNGo4lkbI3RSN1KHI-VFcgIIrGc8O6Zqx_ZA==&ch=PAgTWGhpZpXmZjReZZppbbyZyz0gcplWPOtYRnqqqNUxhVL3xRhZZw==) and show your support if we're actually going to return to leaders who support an America First agenda.

[Join him in the fight today >>](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Y2gqaQKkgya2exPoMneBNc2A2kn2nkYttdHgo_5nwSdozhvpIOlUE6SKKIDxfop5K2MTBlol9UNbVYhwwBOIuoMzvm5-p-NkQHoIiuKSE9fWtSYnCpw-5yDxCbBQ_-VOAoJMtmB1RnW2cFSiw7n8qztFi0NApwrpHVOv0aPDyWy-jA3ru8ap_K50nly2FPq7&c=hygRF06kSvcPiUDfawQNGo4lkbI3RSN1KHI-VFcgIIrGc8O6Zqx_ZA==&ch=PAgTWGhpZpXmZjReZZppbbyZyz0gcplWPOtYRnqqqNUxhVL3xRhZZw==)

\------Begin Forwarded Message------ Subject: I will nominate Trump as Speaker From: Matt Gaetz < [info@mattgaetzforflorida.com](mailto:info@mattgaetzforflorida.com) > Date: Monday, October 11, 2021 at 4:55 PM
---
| Friends,
Last week, I went on Real America's Voice to talk about Donald Trump's return to politics.
I am so impatient to have Trump back, that I went on and publicly declared that I will nominate Donald Trump as Speaker of the House.

[And the best, most inspired leader of our movement is Donald J. Trump.](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Y2gqaQKkgya2exPoMneBNc2A2kn2nkYttdHgo_5nwSdozhvpIOlUE6SKKIDxfop5K2MTBlol9UNbVYhwwBOIuoMzvm5-p-NkQHoIiuKSE9fWtSYnCpw-5yDxCbBQ_-VOAoJMtmB1RnW2cFSiw7n8qztFi0NApwrpHVOv0aPDyWy-jA3ru8ap_K50nly2FPq7&c=hygRF06kSvcPiUDfawQNGo4lkbI3RSN1KHI-VFcgIIrGc8O6Zqx_ZA==&ch=PAgTWGhpZpXmZjReZZppbbyZyz0gcplWPOtYRnqqqNUxhVL3xRhZZw==)
We need to stick together on this. The Liz Cheney and Mitt Romney Republicans want a return to the weak and corporate-sellout days of the past - but we can have bold new leadership next year starting with Donald Trump as Speaker of the House.

subject: Quick update.
body:
When I ran in TX-31 last year, we went to over 50,000 doors and boosted turnout in Williamson County -- making it #1 in the state for voter turnout among the most populous counties. |
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37610626/311831698/-573335974?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NjQ2OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzOGU3Zjg5My05OTJlLWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=a0Jiiop6lYNyCB8Fk3RlvvHSKhJy3ppLbazpwtWQsdo=)
Friend,

Before I ask you to [**chip in $3**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37610627/311831699/1898666321?refcode=em-101621-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NjQ2OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzOGU3Zjg5My05OTJlLWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=a0Jiiop6lYNyCB8Fk3RlvvHSKhJy3ppLbazpwtWQsdo=) to my campaign, I'd like to share some important updates in our race. As one of my grassroots supporters, it's important to keep you in the loop. **• Due to population growth, Texas is getting two new congressional districts.** Hispanics, African-Americans, and Asians made up 95% of Texas' population growth per the 2020 Census, and I'm running in the recently proposed Democratic-leaning district in the Austin area.

**• I'll be on the ballot in the same election as Governor Greg Abbott.** This isn't just a once in a decade opportunity to give working families in Austin real representation in Congress, but a chance to drive Democratic turnout and defeat the Texas GOP up and down the ballot.

**• The Texas GOP is doing everything they can to disenfranchise voters and stifle turnout.** They introduced a number of bad bills that make it harder to vote, they are gerrymandering districts, and plan to increase the penalty for “voter fraud” from a misdemeanor to a felony worth up to 20 years in jail.

**• We have demonstrated success. When I ran in TX-31 last year, we went to over 50,000 doors and boosted turnout in Williamson County -- making it #1 in the state for voter turnout among the most populous counties.** If we repeat that in Travis County, we'll have a significant impact on other statewide races like Abbott's.

**• I'm not taking corporate PAC money.** Last quarter _every single dollar_ we raised was from small grassroots contributions from individuals like you, working families, retirees on a fixed income, and voters in Texas. I know the value of hard-earned money and our campaign will maximize the value of every single contribution. My team is ready to make sure Austinites show up, but that takes a significant amount of time and money. I'm investing all I've got in this race, and I'm asking you to join me:

[**To officially kick off our field operation, we must close the $7,181 gap on our mid-month goal that hits tonight at 11:59 pm. Can you chip in $3 to help us do that? I'm asking because it's critically important that we meet this mark.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37610628/311831700/1898666321?refcode=em-101621-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NjQ2OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzOGU3Zjg5My05OTJlLWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=a0Jiiop6lYNyCB8Fk3RlvvHSKhJy3ppLbazpwtWQsdo=) _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | [Chip in $10 Now](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37610629/311831701/1898666321?refcode=em-101621-all-a&express_lane=true&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NjQ2OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzOGU3Zjg5My05OTJlLWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=a0Jiiop6lYNyCB8Fk3RlvvHSKhJy3ppLbazpwtWQsdo=)

Greater Georgia has officially launched an [internship program](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001WWcr0AEx6z53FgT2Gmq-rJ0hWLAltpoK8NlYauVdFlI03T7aAPvRxpOVRNzFADgdtnw12ziT8qMNCXNRXrvmdrHBs06hNqjuSMUdep30X3TROjAodxlVEPxz72gZEbo-8i7Fb0Hdmke3AzP4TTvbh5quPg6iVvDVS99RY9H1Ld8=&c=qvkYdrfdWHOFYlTQp6dKZ9QYi4ISj1tHTyJS_D77_J-PrbtVAYimZg==&ch=QYVkjZNz1pRDv9DptVDTorP6vrgTOfVaIBZeBMji83w3BSPK4tn2BQ==)! We are recruiting interns to assist with voter registration and engagement. This opportunity will be great to learn the ropes of political organizing, including how to get out the vote, how to engage with voters in a variety of communities, and more. | "Hans von Spakovsky, a former Federal Election Commission member, said the billionaire Facebook founder's donations to a pair of nonprofits that doled out the cash to nearly 2,500 counties in 49 states 'violated fundamental principles of equal treatment of voters since it may have led to unequal opportunities to vote in different areas of a state...'"
"Former US Sen. Kelly Loeffler (R-Ga.), who lost a January runoff to Democratic challenger Raphael Warnock, also retweeted The Post's report.
"'Zuckerberg infiltrated our elections, doling out $45M in GA alone to engineer a partisan takeover of our state's elections operations,' she wrote.
"'That's why we are seeking transparency - from the [secretary of state] and Fulton County. There must be accountability now.'"

| "...a body of research on voting rules such as those in Georgia doesn't support the narrative that turnout will decline significantly because of [the Election Integrity Act (S.B. 202)]...
"Liberal worries that Georgia's voting law, Senate Bill 202, would suppress voters are overblown, said Stephen Lawson, a spokesman for Greater Georgia, a conservative voting group founded by former Republican U.S. Sen. Kelly Loeffler.
"'There are a number of factors that far outweigh the minutia of an election bill in terms of turnout,' Lawson said. 'What is the national conversation going on? What are some of the policy issues that are being discussed? Those things are going to have far more significant impact on turnout.'"

clean_body: | | | | | | | | | == | As part of our Red Belt Blitz, Chairwoman Kelly Loeffler and the team conducted a == in Gainesville in partnership with the Republican Women of Hall County. Thank you to everyone who came to learn about how they can register new voters and defend our conservative values. Stay tuned for an event in your area soon! | == | == | == | == | == | == | == | == | This work is critical to defending conservative values, and it will only be possible through the hard work and support of strong, grassroots volunteers. We need your help! -- Click == or the button below to find out how you can join the fight for conservative values. | | | == | | | Finally, local elections are this November. Get out and vote on or before Tuesday, Nov. 2, to make your voice heard in deciding the future of your city council/commission, local board of education, and more. Check your county's board of election website for details on early voting and locations. Click == to check your voter status and information. | | | | UPDATES: | INTERNSHIP PROGRAM Greater Georgia has officially launched an ==! We are recruiting interns to assist with voter registration and engagement. This opportunity will be great to learn the ropes of political organizing, including how to get out the vote, how to engage with voters in a variety of communities, and more. Possible areas of compensation include class credit, milage reimbursement, and cash incentives based on goal-oriented progress. If you or someone you know is interested, please contact Outreach Coordinator Terry Fye at terry@greatergeorgia.com with questions or to submit a completed application. The full internship application can be found ==. | | | == | | | | IN THE NEWS: | Zuckerberg's election spending was 'carefully orchestrated' to influence 2020 vote: ex-FEC member Oct. 14, 2021 - == | "Hans von Spakovsky, a former Federal Election Commission member, said the billionaire Facebook founder's donations to a pair of nonprofits that doled out the cash to nearly 2,500 counties in 49 states 'violated fundamental principles of equal treatment of voters since it may have led to unequal opportunities to vote in different areas of a state...'" "Former US Sen. Kelly Loeffler (R-Ga.), who lost a January runoff to Democratic challenger Raphael Warnock, also retweeted The Post's report. "'Zuckerberg infiltrated our elections, doling out $45M in GA alone to engineer a partisan takeover of our state's elections operations,' she wrote. "'That's why we are seeking transparency - from the [secretary of state] and Fulton County. There must be accountability now.'" Click == to read the full article. | | | | Will Georgia voting laws reduce turnout? Maybe not, studies show Oct. 11, 2021 - == | "...a body of research on voting rules such as those in Georgia doesn't support the narrative that turnout will decline significantly because of [the Election Integrity Act (S.B. 202)]... "Liberal worries that Georgia's voting law, Senate Bill 202, would suppress voters are overblown, said Stephen Lawson, a spokesman for Greater Georgia, a conservative voting group founded by former Republican U.S. Sen. Kelly Loeffler. "'There are a number of factors that far outweigh the minutia of an election bill in terms of turnout,' Lawson said. 'What is the national conversation going on? What are some of the policy issues that are being discussed? Those things are going to have far more significant impact on turnout.'" Click == to read the full article. | | | | Fulton election workers accused of shredding voter registration applications Oct. 11, 2021 - == | "Two Fulton County election workers fired for allegedly shredding voter registration applications before Tuesday's start to municipal elections is the latest controversy dogging a county already under fire as the state investigates potential election mismanagement. "Kelly Loeffler, former Georgia GOP U.S. senator, said Monday that her voter accountability organization, Greater Georgia, would try to uncover compromised voter applications using its registration records... "'The continued incompetence and lawlessness in Fulton County cannot stand,' Greater Georgia tweeted." Team -

Just this week I was the only Pennsylvania House candidate named as a "Young Gun" by the NRCC! That means all of our hard work here in the Lehigh Valley is being noticed by others nationally! This district is going to be one of the most competitive in the Country and I will be working nonstop in our effort to prevent the American Dream from turning into a Socialist Nightmare.

Whether I am out knocking on doors for candidates or talking to everyday voters, it is quite apparent to me that government is not working for them. Don't believe me? Lets look at what they have been up to:
1. Gas is at a 7 year high as the Democrat Congress continues to push for American dependence on foreign energy.
2. Soaring inflation with the price of commodities like bacon at a 40 year high
3. The botched withdrawal in Afghanistan
4. Abandonment of Israel at the hands of the radical left
5. Abysmal jobs reports that show more people leaving the workforce than joining
6. A border crisis of their own making that is allowing illegal immigration and illegal drugs to flood across the border
7. Fighting over how much of your money they want to spend on their road to socialism

We are going to have the fight of our lives in 2022 to keep our American Dream from turning into a Socialist Nightmare and I need your help to do so. Please sign up to volunteer, donate to the campaign, and share with your friends. Let's win this!

-Lisa

[](http://links.schellerforcongress.com/u/click?_t=2618b931a0124f90ba4a51cf9fda2c48&_m=09959003f2fa447495f0f958a9a3653d&_e=bg1ZXlE-XeDSRmLVYBPHUQtjT9qdkjmH-0Yk4nXTIuMgr-iAe54lgTZcdyln_ghNVr268ComDMCoPtc5u64WuiePi5gO6FUV_L6DzAR7Z3bV_dAD_6cl2i35rDnwjB465qphiP0KUCnwNl-M7tkhw5uujC4AIkmsbQzb979Nq0zWijJ9zpg3Eyz3expGyPCFOSX-CmottSrvYPOFRJHOizCK6usHJo5ylkbVhazF5HOGivT4Ya_uWfOJk9dta2-AmM_Gw1qPu0iun7jFoTO1Kit-Z7iUXPqteoI2dgE1mNuQwbG6MRTDBNKNC32CGFHIY2AO0ntz0-fJwYbW1kWc4A%3D%3D)

**Whats Happening in Washington?**

Recently, it has surfaced that the Democrat's 3.5 trillion dollar plan includes a massive amount of funding for the IRS. They want to weaponize the IRS to spy on your bank account! If you spend over $600 a year through an online processing app such as paypal or Venmo, you would need to submit a report to the IRS.

So to examine this, the plan that the Democrat majority in Congress is trying to pass that they swear will cost $0 and not raise taxes on the middle class, wants to weaponize the IRS to spy on every day purchases you have. Right.

It is clear that this Democrat spending spree is Socialism wrapped up in a bow, and now the left is coming after your bank accounts to try and pay for it. Enough is enough. Time to get Susan Wild out of there.

clean_body: Lisa Scheller for Congress Newsletter! Find out what Lisa has been up to and what Susan Wild has been doing this week! Scheller for Congress Newsletter | | | ---|--- Team - Just this week I was the only Pennsylvania House candidate named as a "Young Gun" by the NRCC! That means all of our hard work here in the Lehigh Valley is being noticed by others nationally! This district is going to be one of the most competitive in the Country and I will be working nonstop in our effort to prevent the American Dream from turning into a Socialist Nightmare. Whether I am out knocking on doors for candidates or talking to everyday voters, it is quite apparent to me that government is not working for them. Don't believe me? Lets look at what they have been up to: 1. Gas is at a 7 year high as the Democrat Congress continues to push for American dependence on foreign energy. 2. Soaring inflation with the price of commodities like bacon at a 40 year high 3. The botched withdrawal in Afghanistan 4. Abandonment of Israel at the hands of the radical left 5. Abysmal jobs reports that show more people leaving the workforce than joining 6. A border crisis of their own making that is allowing illegal immigration and illegal drugs to flood across the border 7. Fighting over how much of your money they want to spend on their road to socialism We are going to have the fight of our lives in 2022 to keep our American Dream from turning into a Socialist Nightmare and I need your help to do so. Please sign up to volunteer, donate to the campaign, and share with your friends. Let's win this! -Lisa | THIS SUNDAY! Join Team Scheller in going door to door to help our local candidates! Meet at the at 1PM! mailto:pierce@schellerforcongress.com?subject=RSVP%20for%20Sunday%20at%20the%20LCRC&body=Name%3A%20%20%20%20%20%20%20%20%20%20%20%20%20Number%3A | Whats Happening in Washington? Recently, it has surfaced that the Democrat's 3.5 trillion dollar plan includes a massive amount of funding for the IRS. They want to weaponize the IRS to spy on your bank account! If you spend over $600 a year through an online processing app such as paypal or Venmo, you would need to submit a report to the IRS. So to examine this, the plan that the Democrat majority in Congress is trying to pass that they swear will cost $0 and not raise taxes on the middle class, wants to weaponize the IRS to spy on every day purchases you have. Right. It is clear that this Democrat spending spree is Socialism wrapped up in a bow, and now the left is coming after your bank accounts to try and pay for it. Enough is enough. Time to get Susan Wild out of there. | Check out Lisa's interview on the National Desk! | Photos from the District! Northampton County Republican Dinner Door to Door in Lehigh County Hope and Coffee Check Reception! Other Photos from Around the District! | Listen to Lisa's Interview on the Matt Rooney Show! | Where to find me! mailto:karenfrey60@yahoo.com?subject=Bangor%20Octoberfest%20Volunteer "karenfrey60@yahoo.com" mailto:pierce@schellerforcongress.com?subject=I%20would%20like%20to%20help%20on%20Sunday! "pierce@schellerforcongress.com" mailto:cjcmgr1@msn.com?subject=Bath%20Halloween%20Parade%20Volunteer "cjcmgr1@msn.com" mailto:karenfrey60@yahoo.com?subject=Bangor%20Halloween%20Parade%20Volunteer "karenfrey60@yahoo.com" mailto:coleman.jim@rcn.com?subject=Northampton%20Jack%20Frost%20Parade%20Volunteer "coleman.jim@rcn.com" | As always, be sure to keep an eye out for future updates from the campaign and future events! Onward to victory, Team Scheller | Check out our Social Media Pages! | | ---|--- PAID FOR BY LISA SCHELLER FOR CONGRESS

I’m running for Governor because we need to defend and continue that progress right here in Pennsylvania.
