name: Derek Marshall
subject: URGENT: We’re running behind
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Derek Marshall for Congress
body:
Peter,
**Things have been busy here at Team Derek. **Between doing voter registration, talking to local Democratic clubs, and making donation calls, our schedules are full. I have personally spent hours every day on the phone with donors so we can raise the resources we need to execute our ground game.

**Our campaign has determined exactly how much we need to raise to pay for the staff, data, literature, and tech we’ll need to get to victory next year.** Spoiler alert: it’s a big number. But here’s the thing: with the loyal grassroots following we have, I’m confident we can and will reach our goal, as long as we work hard for it.

Right now though, there’s a bit of a problem. We’re running behind on our weekly goal and we have to make up the difference ASAP. [**Your donation today will help us stay on track and ensure we can shore up the resources we need to implement our winning strategy. Will you chip in RIGHT NOW and help?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37611906/311839985/-1802129325?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODEyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MTEwMTk0ZS05ZTJlLWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1S51jl4Bia4s2zJkSybIVrjEkho7A26B1j_fd9vVoLo=)

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37611908/311839986/-1802129325?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODEyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MTEwMTk0ZS05ZTJlLWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1S51jl4Bia4s2zJkSybIVrjEkho7A26B1j_fd9vVoLo=)
Campaigns spend months building up our war chests before our elections because the type of ground games we need is expensive. We have a comprehensive plan that we know will take us to victory, but it’s going to take a lot more resources for us to actually execute it. **We don’t want to cut any corners, because flipping a red district blue takes a lot of work, and we want to do it right. **

We need to reach everybody registered Democrat, persuade folks with no party preference, and register folks who haven’t been voting. The voters are out there right now, and every day that passes we need to do everything we can to reach them. **[That takes real money in the bank. Will you donate $10, $25, or $50 TODAY and invest in our campaign? Remember, every dollar counts.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37611910/311839988/-1802129325?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODEyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MTEwMTk0ZS05ZTJlLWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1S51jl4Bia4s2zJkSybIVrjEkho7A26B1j_fd9vVoLo=) **

In Solidarity,

clean_body: Peter, Things have been busy here at Team Derek. Between doing voter registration, talking to local Democratic clubs, and making donation calls, our schedules are full. I have personally spent hours every day on the phone with donors so we can raise the resources we need to execute our ground game. Our campaign has determined exactly how much we need to raise to pay for the staff, data, literature, and tech we’ll need to get to victory next year. Spoiler alert: it’s a big number. But here’s the thing: with the loyal grassroots following we have, I’m confident we can and will reach our goal, as long as we work hard for it. Right now though, there’s a bit of a problem. We’re running behind on our weekly goal and we have to make up the difference ASAP. = = Campaigns spend months building up our war chests before our elections because the type of ground games we need is expensive. We have a comprehensive plan that we know will take us to victory, but it’s going to take a lot more resources for us to actually execute it. We don’t want to cut any corners, because flipping a red district blue takes a lot of work, and we want to do it right. We need to reach everybody registered Democrat, persuade folks with no party preference, and register folks who haven’t been voting. The voters are out there right now, and every day that passes we need to do everything we can to reach them. = In Solidarity, Derek Marshall * = Paid for by Derek Marshall for Congress. P.O. Box 2836, Victorville, CA 92395 • tel:\(760\ 486-2416)

name: Malcolm Kenyatta for Senate
subject: Baby Malcolm:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Malcolm PAC
body:
#

This little boy was raised by two working-class parents in the projects of North Philly.
If you knew he could make history by becoming the first person of color ever elected to the U.S. Senate from Pennsylvania — and the first openly LGBTQ man elected to the Senate — wouldn’t you contribute to help make it possible?
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37611954/311840064/-360183459?refcode2=70a32667-9e2e-ec11-981f-c896653b9208&refcode=em211016-1-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MGEzMjY2Ny05ZTJlLWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=PrY5wkG_HAJ4x0f-z7nBVnWCSS8yOn7WOb4Lr2qaGJY=)
That little boy is Malcolm Kenyatta and he’s running to be the champion working families need fighting for us in Washington — and he needs your help.
[Can you make a $3 contribution to stand with Malcolm today? Our campaign is funded by lots of working folks chipping in a few bucks at a time, so every donation makes a big difference in our success.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37611956/311840066/-360183459?refcode2=70a32667-9e2e-ec11-981f-c896653b9208&refcode=em211016-1-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MGEzMjY2Ny05ZTJlLWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=PrY5wkG_HAJ4x0f-z7nBVnWCSS8yOn7WOb4Lr2qaGJY=)
Malcolm’s mother taught him from a young age that if he saw something broken, he should step up and try to fix it.
He watched her ration her insulin and saw how upside-down life in this country is for folks like us.
Now, he’s running to be the loudest voice for working people in the United States Senate. And if enough of us stand with him, he will win.
[So we have to come right out and ask: Will you pitch in $3 to help this little boy fight for change that works for working families? He’s counting on us to stand with him in this fight.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37611958/311840068/-360183459?refcode2=70a32667-9e2e-ec11-981f-c896653b9208&refcode=em211016-1-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MGEzMjY2Ny05ZTJlLWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=PrY5wkG_HAJ4x0f-z7nBVnWCSS8yOn7WOb4Lr2qaGJY=)
Thanks for pitching in if you can.
\- Team Malcolm

name: MondaireforCongress.com
subject: Here’s what happens when you pitch in $5
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mondaire for Congress_
body:
#

Team,
We have made great strides in recent years towards affirming LGBTQ+ rights. Despite our recent progress, LGBTQ+ people still face violence, higher rates of homelessness, and a higher risk of contracting HIV.
As a member of Congress, my highest priority is to keep every American safe and healthy — and as the first openly gay, Black member of Congress, I understand how the health and safety of LGBTQ+ people are constantly under assault.
I also know we have the power to change that.
Yesterday, I was proud to share that I recently introduced the _PrEP Assistance Program Act_ alongside Rep. Watson Coleman. This legislation will ensure every person in need of PrEP — lifesaving medication to prevent HIV — can obtain it, regardless of their ability to pay.
This is a matter of both LGBTQ+ and racial justice. LGBTQ+ people, especially those of color, still suffer from HIV at a disproportionate rate — a reflection of already-existing economic and health disparities.
We still have a lot of work ahead, but with this legislation, we are making progress in that ongoing fight — and bringing ourselves one step closer to eradicating HIV/AIDS.
**[If you can, please consider making a contribution today to support my re-election campaign to ensure I can continue fighting in Washington for LGBTQ+ equity.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37611992/311840324/1515758891?refcode2=ab4282d4-9e2e-ec11-981f-c896653b9208&refcode=AU_MLJ_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20211016_AM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODAzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhYjQyODJkNC05ZTJlLWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=N4JUqo5a7anCRR_SIMim0AE93PXPtQClf4DsDIWz2Zk=)**

name: =?utf-8?Q?Douglas=20Carswell?=
subject: On a Roll! - Progress Update from the Mississippi Center for Public Policy
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/mspolicy/progressupdate?e=5703353baa)
---
| |
---
|
Dear Friend,
Normally each Saturday I send you a policy update. Today, I wanted to share with you a progress report on what we have achieved over the past few months as Mississippi’s leading free-market advocacy organization. **Growing our audience:** We have dramatically increased our audience across the state. Almost 60,000 people have signed up to hear from us each week. We are on target to reach 100,000 subscribers!
---
|
---
| **School Choice:** With so little progress made on school choice over the years, we believe it is time for a fundamentally different approach. Working with a coalition of partners, we are helping draft several key reforms that simply have not been tried before.
**Free speech:** Administrators at Ole Miss tried to punish "Young Americans for Freedom" for celebrating the anniversary of the fall of the Berlin Wall without permission. Really. But we threatened action, and they backed down – ensuring a victory for free speech on campus.
**Getting our message across:** Tens of thousands of Mississippians watch our online output! Here are some examples of our most viral videos, [Prince Harry is Wrong!](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=f5e2b909d4&e=5703353baa) and [Who Are the Highest-Paid Mississippi Public Officials?](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=d651d5cb2f&e=5703353baa)
**Combating Critical Race Theory:** We published a bill in order to help educate policymakers on how to tackle this divisive ideology.
**Taking on the Fat Cats: **Our report into the highest-paid public officials in the state caused a stir when we revealed how much public money was being spent by officials on themselves. We will soon be publishing a proposal to ensure taxpayers aren’t ripped off.
Thank you for all that you do to encourage and support the cause of liberty. We would not be able to do what we do without you!
Have a great weekend!

---
| |
---

Warm Regards,

Douglas Carswell
President & CEO

**_Ps: Below you can find some of the latest media coverage on our most recent policy paper!_**

---
|
---
| | [ ](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=a2cb53de86&e=5703353baa)
---
Douglas recently published on op-ed related to our CRT report in _the Sun Herald._ Click to read.
|
---
| [ ](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=9c35fef266&e=5703353baa)
---
The nationally-recognized _Associated Press_ covered our report. Click to read.
|
---
| |
---
| [ ](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=5c9f524ab9&e=5703353baa)
---
_WLBT_ stopped by the office to interview Douglas. Click to watch.
| [ ](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=64a331f03c&e=5703353baa)
---
Douglas stopped by _SuperTalk_ to break down the report and explain why he believes CRT is so incredibly dangerous to the republic. Click to watch.
|
---
|
---
| _ _
You are receiving this email because you opted in via our website.

**Our mailing address is:**
Mississippi Center for Public Policy520 George StJackson, MS 39202-3013
[Add us to your address book](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/vcard?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=2f68021ebd)

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/profile?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=2f68021ebd&e=5703353baa&c=39e91f8605) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=2f68021ebd&e=5703353baa&c=39e91f8605).

_Copyright © 2021 Mississippi Center for Public Policy, All rights reserved._

|
Peter-
Dan Crenshaw here.
This week, I continued to call out the Biden Administration's callous response to rising inflation, supply chain shortages, and an overall terrible economy. I also called for Biden's Homeland Security Secretary to be impeached over his dereliction of duty at our southern border.
As always, thank you for your support and please stay up to date with me on [Facebook](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001WLjcgcapCV-wn6bANjT-ZAQBuU2tV8qfREvAd_SyjAtHPIVdB-d1n_WiAcMxnHV4F_8CWyYr74518e2tdAmwJqSBUvSCjHX9wSmciJ4nh-CX_afelDg3DViqwbbTia1PABQZ1WdZjE9FVts0InDju4wINpHyxSyyxGUOKG358so=&c=UEY_P1xgrDitRYhCxJm2kjYzW9JxRCaqt-61ZmS1N3lqIfLwEO_w-g==&ch=x3OSMIYfGvyBvbSp-9A6HiDJPqFiDsiDRdoBNgHotEs85QVVGHmCAg==), [Twitter](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001WLjcgcapCV-wn6bANjT-ZAQBuU2tV8qfREvAd_SyjAtHPIVdB-d1n3HUaTtncKLXiYa7Z0nh7K9fMeTyu8Bu5isMdzu_SINZjW6wsj3AqBfpLb1-lhp7OTurqtGdJZo3cTncyaMJNEIITVu0_GCpHm0gNdGTSrDT&c=UEY_P1xgrDitRYhCxJm2kjYzW9JxRCaqt-61ZmS1N3lqIfLwEO_w-g==&ch=x3OSMIYfGvyBvbSp-9A6HiDJPqFiDsiDRdoBNgHotEs85QVVGHmCAg==), and [Instagram](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001WLjcgcapCV-wn6bANjT-ZAQBuU2tV8qfREvAd_SyjAtHPIVdB-d1n3HUaTtncKLX-crbZnu88-MQYaIDwuNTGYPECXWyhjruGnk3QtBwWubisP1Zxw-BEFRF5jcO-gqJ9mwMM_h-RukxDqcw1QUdJsGc7CjSEg-winStvan0AFU=&c=UEY_P1xgrDitRYhCxJm2kjYzW9JxRCaqt-61ZmS1N3lqIfLwEO_w-g==&ch=x3OSMIYfGvyBvbSp-9A6HiDJPqFiDsiDRdoBNgHotEs85QVVGHmCAg==).
Now, here's your brief.
---
| | |
---
| |
---
| IMPEACH
---
| [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001WLjcgcapCV-wn6bANjT-ZAQBuU2tV8qfREvAd_SyjAtHPIVdB-d1n9qyjjaz0C-IshP-XgWDSMWaN9xAf-l2trBR4nStokXckefK0sXr_ySCYFEOnrqzjwnIrEXW0i1zwl65h8xY64UUQWR87VFbRYG7F_8YhjvvMVOm9_1wXOZW6VHLVY5h98sXA335KMsr0Hom0vIxMY-SFiGuu63MFtyqHZPoUyzUHY6hzzeppKDrQkYBUE3qmA==&c=UEY_P1xgrDitRYhCxJm2kjYzW9JxRCaqt-61ZmS1N3lqIfLwEO_w-g==&ch=x3OSMIYfGvyBvbSp-9A6HiDJPqFiDsiDRdoBNgHotEs85QVVGHmCAg==)
---
| [CLICK HERE OR ON THE IMAGE ABOVE TO READ MORE](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001WLjcgcapCV-wn6bANjT-ZAQBuU2tV8qfREvAd_SyjAtHPIVdB-d1n9qyjjaz0C-IshP-XgWDSMWaN9xAf-l2trBR4nStokXckefK0sXr_ySCYFEOnrqzjwnIrEXW0i1zwl65h8xY64UUQWR87VFbRYG7F_8YhjvvMVOm9_1wXOZW6VHLVY5h98sXA335KMsr0Hom0vIxMY-SFiGuu63MFtyqHZPoUyzUHY6hzzeppKDrQkYBUE3qmA==&c=UEY_P1xgrDitRYhCxJm2kjYzW9JxRCaqt-61ZmS1N3lqIfLwEO_w-g==&ch=x3OSMIYfGvyBvbSp-9A6HiDJPqFiDsiDRdoBNgHotEs85QVVGHmCAg==)
Hundreds of thousands of illegal immigrants are flooding across our southern border. We're seeing fentanyl flood into our streets and COVID cases spiking in Texas border communities.
Joe Biden is ultimately to blame for this. But there's one person who has direct oversight over the border: Homeland Security Secretary Alejandro Mayorkas.
---
| | | [SIGN THE PETITION. IMPEACH MAYORKAS.](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001WLjcgcapCV-wn6bANjT-ZAQBuU2tV8qfREvAd_SyjAtHPIVdB-d1nwmjgKKXKNgBdAQQEEs9OEIFgbQf1dZSA8UT9CI6agOqqaKSCEqBZTIKnXZSAtXruavBaa0jDLdvwyuDsQyxTlvJ0IGtwQsY00R57pdzuP3n45edE2g8hN1iuAirQtPFbhWhIi0Fkm235IRql1Jkaca6_iPupOtbcGEtrpKUeaZ5BzBBK1mcqcNvmyHvoaCdJ56ZZT1G64qu-xc184esk0VGvB1N2jr7qevAY8N9Jbhu6V_M5caJF49TyUKxy9jl29b24h1rPzzzg9MW_djjS64QS_RxSkBl55e5tlIFd221&c=UEY_P1xgrDitRYhCxJm2kjYzW9JxRCaqt-61ZmS1N3lqIfLwEO_w-g==&ch=x3OSMIYfGvyBvbSp-9A6HiDJPqFiDsiDRdoBNgHotEs85QVVGHmCAg==)
---
| There are very clear examples of a deliberate dereliction of constitutional duty on the part of the secretary of Homeland Security. His job is in the name of his title - to secure the homeland. Secretary Mayorkas has failed miserably to do his job.
Whether it's canceling border wall contracts or simply a refusal to actually enforce the laws of our country, Mayorkas has done nothing but encourage illegal immigration.
And the only action that he has taken has been against those border agents trying to do their job on horseback, trying to stop people from rushing the border. It's clear that Secretary Mayorkas has lost the confidence of the American people and he needs to go.
We need to impeach Mayorkas and secure our border. I'm going to turn up the heat until that happens.
[JOIN THE FIGHT TO SECURE OUR BORDER AND IMPEACH MAYORKAS.](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001WLjcgcapCV-wn6bANjT-ZAQBuU2tV8qfREvAd_SyjAtHPIVdB-d1nwmjgKKXKNgBdAQQEEs9OEIFgbQf1dZSA8UT9CI6agOqqaKSCEqBZTIKnXZSAtXruavBaa0jDLdvwyuDsQyxTlvJ0IGtwQsY00R57pdzuP3n45edE2g8hN1iuAirQtPFbhWhIi0Fkm235IRql1Jkaca6_iPupOtbcGEtrpKUeaZ5BzBBK1mcqcNvmyHvoaCdJ56ZZT1G64qu-xc184esk0VGvB1N2jr7qevAY8N9Jbhu6V_M5caJF49TyUKxy9jl29b24h1rPzzzg9MW_djjS64QS_RxSkBl55e5tlIFd221&c=UEY_P1xgrDitRYhCxJm2kjYzW9JxRCaqt-61ZmS1N3lqIfLwEO_w-g==&ch=x3OSMIYfGvyBvbSp-9A6HiDJPqFiDsiDRdoBNgHotEs85QVVGHmCAg==)
---
| |
---
| | |
---
| |
---
| WHERE IS KAMALA?
---
| [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001WLjcgcapCV-wn6bANjT-ZAQBuU2tV8qfREvAd_SyjAtHPIVdB-d1n9qyjjaz0C-I2Lcx309Toi6kvNoFSKIIYK1NCxK6zjtFJbbOoGQEJFXO5T7VSoysbhUhCfG041EW4fmbt2XxyjpCNKrPt9P2p4dv1dts4UEDGXQPZ8TuIEaCPRyhkrpprKHmnwxWeg2nOU_sFlyk962H0_3CVEheZHIBIc0g9NKPs-aqnEIGpJBYZquV0y2pd6mzVcpw9OVD5aOo_MDhj_TP4rsPMTuQQKycmYxmOrn0&c=UEY_P1xgrDitRYhCxJm2kjYzW9JxRCaqt-61ZmS1N3lqIfLwEO_w-g==&ch=x3OSMIYfGvyBvbSp-9A6HiDJPqFiDsiDRdoBNgHotEs85QVVGHmCAg==)

| [CLICK HERE OR ON THE IMAGE ABOVE TO READ MORE](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001WLjcgcapCV-wn6bANjT-ZAQBuU2tV8qfREvAd_SyjAtHPIVdB-d1n9qyjjaz0C-I2Lcx309Toi6kvNoFSKIIYK1NCxK6zjtFJbbOoGQEJFXO5T7VSoysbhUhCfG041EW4fmbt2XxyjpCNKrPt9P2p4dv1dts4UEDGXQPZ8TuIEaCPRyhkrpprKHmnwxWeg2nOU_sFlyk962H0_3CVEheZHIBIc0g9NKPs-aqnEIGpJBYZquV0y2pd6mzVcpw9OVD5aOo_MDhj_TP4rsPMTuQQKycmYxmOrn0&c=UEY_P1xgrDitRYhCxJm2kjYzW9JxRCaqt-61ZmS1N3lqIfLwEO_w-g==&ch=x3OSMIYfGvyBvbSp-9A6HiDJPqFiDsiDRdoBNgHotEs85QVVGHmCAg==)

This week, I continued to call out the Biden Administration's callous response to rising inflation, supply chain shortages, and an overall terrible economy. I also called for Biden's Homeland Security Secretary to be impeached over his dereliction of duty at our southern border. As always, thank you for your support and please stay up to date with me on ==, ==, and ==. Now, here's your brief. | | | | | | IMPEACH | == | == Hundreds of thousands of illegal immigrants are flooding across our southern border. We're seeing fentanyl flood into our streets and COVID cases spiking in Texas border communities. Joe Biden is ultimately to blame for this. But there's one person who has direct oversight over the border: Homeland Security Secretary Alejandro Mayorkas. | | | == | There are very clear examples of a deliberate dereliction of constitutional duty on the part of the secretary of Homeland Security. His job is in the name of his title - to secure the homeland. Secretary Mayorkas has failed miserably to do his job. Whether it's canceling border wall contracts or simply a refusal to actually enforce the laws of our country, Mayorkas has done nothing but encourage illegal immigration. And the only action that he has taken has been against those border agents trying to do their job on horseback, trying to stop people from rushing the border. It's clear that Secretary Mayorkas has lost the confidence of the American people and he needs to go. We need to impeach Mayorkas and secure our border. I'm going to turn up the heat until that happens. == | | | | | | | | WHERE IS KAMALA? | == | == It has been hundreds of days since Joe appointed his Vice President to "lead the response" to the border crisis. But after months and months of inaction and ZERO visits to the actual border, many are asking a simple question: where is Kamala? | | | == | She's supposed to be the border czar, but just this week she SKIPPED A NATIONAL SECURITY MEETING ABOUT THE BORDER to visit a bakery in New Jersey. You can't make this stuff up. Why won't she go to the border? Why won't she show any leadership? It's pretty simple. Because she doesn't care about border security. I'm going to do everything I can to make sure every Democrat responsible for this border crisis is voted out of office. But I need your help to do that. While millionaires like Joe and Nancy and Kamala run the country from the comfort of the White House and the Speaker's Chair, they're laughing at Americans struggling. We need to win back the majority and FIRE Nancy Pelosi. We need to take back the Senate and FIRE Chuck Schumer. We need to take back the White House and FIRE Joe Biden. body:
| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37612159/311841477/-74008005?refcode=20211016_EM_ValDemings&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMTg2MDEzYi1hMTJlLWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ORBDDOHUjRaC3Q0vb1D6PITBJWFISygheeDbh1v51Xc=) Friend, I'm Val Demings, and I'm running for the U.S. Senate to defeat Marco Rubio and win better, stronger leadership for the people of Florida. We're barely out of the gate, and election experts are already calling this a top battleground race for the Senate. Just 10,033 votes (0.2 percentage points) decided Florida's last Senate race – so I'll tell you the plain truth: **I cannot win this without you.** [**That's why I'm asking you to become one of the donors to my campaign for Senate by splitting a contribution between me and Serve America right now. Every dollar you can spare will help us build the strongest grassroots operation to defeat Rubio, flip Florida blue and defend our Senate majority.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37612160/311841478/-74008005?refcode=20211016_EM_ValDemings&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMTg2MDEzYi1hMTJlLWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ORBDDOHUjRaC3Q0vb1D6PITBJWFISygheeDbh1v51Xc=) Every day, I carry with me that I am a descendent of enslaved people, people who knew that they would not make it, but dreamed and prayed that one day I would. Their prayers carried me to this day – carried me through a life of public service as a social worker, as a law enforcement officer, the first Black woman to serve as Orlando's police chief, and as the proud representative of Florida's 10th Congressional district. **So hear me when I say this: Only in America can a little Black girl, the daughter of a maid and a janitor growing up in the South in the ’60s, have an amazing story of opportunity like mine.** The prayers of my parents propel me forward, even now, giving me the strength and courage it takes to do what's right. To impeach and prosecute a corrupt president. To never stop fighting for gun safety reform. To push for truth, accountability, justice. [**I stand on the side of our democratic institutions, on the side of everyday working Floridians – but I need your help to win this race. Will you split a contribution of $20 or more to Serve America and me to defeat Marco Rubio, win in Florida and defend our Democratic Senate majority?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37612161/311841479/-74008005?refcode=20211016_EM_ValDemings&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMTg2MDEzYi1hMTJlLWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ORBDDOHUjRaC3Q0vb1D6PITBJWFISygheeDbh1v51Xc=) In my decades of public service, I've worked with some truly incredible individuals – champions of civil rights like my friend John Lewis, who said, "Each generation must do its part to create an even more fair, more just society." We're at an inflection point for our democracy that will decide if we live up to John Lewis' dream, friend. The modern-day Republican Party is committed to the exact opposite of what Congressman Lewis stood for. Marco Rubio and Senate Republicans grow more extreme by the day, more committed to a dangerous, anti-democratic agenda. Putting party over the future of our democracy, over the wants and needs of Florida's working families. You have my word, that when it comes to winning this race and delivering better leadership for Florida, I will fight like never before. Because when your friends and neighbors put their trust in you to be their voice, you work for them – and that's just not what we're seeing from Sen. Rubio. But it's only together that we'll have a shot at winning – so here's what I'm counting on: **6,112 donations, the very first ones of this race, before 11:59 p.m. tonight. Are you in, friend?** [**Split a contribution between Serve America and me of $20 or more right now – whatever you can spare to fuel our battleground Senate race – so we can defeat Marco Rubio, flip Florida blue and defend our Democratic Senate clean_body: | | | = Friend, I'm Val Demings, and I'm running for the U.S. Senate to defeat Marco Rubio and win better, stronger leadership for the people of Florida. We're barely out of the gate, and election experts are already calling this a top battleground race for the Senate. Just 10,033 votes (0.2 percentage points) decided Florida's last Senate race – so I'll tell you the plain truth: I cannot win this without you. = Every day, I carry with me that I am a descendent of enslaved people, people who knew that they would not make it, but dreamed and prayed that one day I would. Their prayers carried me to this day – carried me through a life of public service as a social worker, as a law enforcement officer, the first Black woman to serve as Orlando's police chief, and as the proud representative of Florida's 10th Congressional district. So hear me when I say this: Only in America can a little Black girl, the daughter of a maid and a janitor growing up in the South in the ’60s, have an amazing story of opportunity like mine. The prayers of my parents propel me forward, even now, giving me the strength and courage it takes to do what's right. To impeach and prosecute a corrupt president. To never stop fighting for gun safety reform. To push for truth, accountability, justice. = In my decades of public service, I've worked with some truly incredible individuals – champions of civil rights like my friend John Lewis, who said, "Each generation must do its part to create an even more fair, more just society." We're at an inflection point for our democracy that will decide if we live up to John Lewis' dream, friend. The modern-day Republican Party is committed to the exact opposite of what Congressman Lewis stood for. Marco Rubio and Senate Republicans grow more extreme by the day, more committed to a dangerous, anti-democratic agenda. Putting party over the future of our democracy, over the wants and needs of Florida's working families. You have my word, that when it comes to winning this race and delivering better leadership for Florida, I will fight like never before. Because when your friends and neighbors put their trust in you to be their voice, you work for them – and that's just not what we're seeing from Sen. Rubio. But it's only together that we'll have a shot at winning – so here's what I'm counting on: 6,112 donations, the very first ones of this race, before 11:59 p.m. tonight. Are you in, friend? = From the bottom of my heart, friend, thank you for being on my team. —Congresswoman Val Demings = | | | | ---|---|---|--- If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please . | Paid for by Serve America PAC Serve America PAC PO Box 2013 Salem, MA 01970 United States

body:

---
| | | Patriot,

Rep. Jake LaTurner is fighting hard for us in Washington, _**and he wants to hear from you.**_

In recent months, we've seen a new term come into the American mainstream: **Critical Race Theory**.

We want to know what you think. Answer this [quick CRT survey](https://jakelaturner.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e36c5b1e49908a49477cee2b3&id=395e26c92e&e=1050d051da).

We must fight back against those who wish to change this nation by indoctrinating our children with these anti-American ideologies.

Team LaTurner

Folks,

We're coming to you today to ask for your urgent donation.

name: Trump News HQ
subject: Help us fight socialism
body:
Socialism appears to be on the rise in our country, especially among the young, and we want to understand the extent of that sup
_Sponsored message_
| | |
---
| | This sponsored message from Trump Train News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zeba4c7poaapfb7f9sh4nfrm119rni3hqt31sh4g_rp22sh2s8i66pj1c5g6eoj6cph2bs)
| | | Dear Fellow American, Socialism appears to be on the rise in our country, especially among the young, and we want to understand the extent of that support. That’s why you have been selected by Hillsdale College to represent your state in a National Survey on Socialism. With your response, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans—views that we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. Every month, Hillsdale College is reaching millions of Americans with educational outreach. Your response to this National Survey on Socialism is essential in helping us form the most effective strategy in fighting for the future of our country. So please give your views on the political, media, and cultural forces that are promoting socialism in our country today, by completing this National Survey on Socialism: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/2021-national-survey-on-socialism/](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zipaart7pik1fv548ruqrp6ir62m1otsiij94pt0_rp22sh2s8i66pj1c5g6eoj6cph2bs)** There is no doubt in my mind that, especially among younger Americans, socialism is increasingly attractive—and that this threatens the future of American liberty. As Winston Churchill noted, “Socialism is the philosophy of failure, the creed of ignorance, and the gospel of envy.” And education is the surest way to defeat it. If you agree, please stand with Hillsdale College as we promote intelligent patriotism and defend liberty through education. Please represent your state and take the National Survey on Socialism today. | [**Take the Survey**](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zo11vdiecqs5l06dot40pdilbl0pl849jmqgvi3g_rp22sh2s8i66pj1c5g6eoj6cph2bs)
---
Warm Regards,
Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth - Defending Liberty since 1844
| | Hillsdale College 33 East College St Hillsdale, MI 49242 USA

---

name: Erica Smith
subject: Maybe next year, I’ll still be a teacher and a preacher
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Erica Smith for US Senate 2022
body:
This is your final chance to make an impact.
#
**A lot of people are doubting us.** They’re saying it’s not possible for a progressive Black woman to win the Democratic nomination for U.S. Senate in North Carolina.
Maybe it’s not. Maybe next year, I’ll still be a teacher and a preacher, changing one heart and mind at a time.
But maybe it is possible. No, as a matter of fact — **I KNOW it is possible to win our primary and this U.S. Senate seat, especially if our campaign can bring in the remaining 25 contributions we need to hit our goal of 350 online contributions by midnight.**
We are coming together, one donation at a time, to say that we are ready for change and that we are the change-makers.
[**Is there any way you could please make a donation of $5, $10, $25, or any amount to our campaign before midnight? This is your final chance to make an impact before our mid-month fundraising deadline.**](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/22187?refcode=em20211016-553&%3Bamounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=553%2E3698%2E_PRQWK)
**[Donate $5](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/22187?refcode=em20211016-553&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=20&akid=553%2E3698%2E_PRQWK)**
Thank you from the bottom of my heart,
[](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/22187?refcode=em20211016-553&%3Bamounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&akid=553%2E3698%2E_PRQWK)
Erica
Erica Smith for U.S. Senate

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/es-emails?refcode=em20211016-553-footer&t=22&refcode2=553_3698__PRQWK&akid=553%2E3698%2E_PRQWK)**
---
Email us: [info@ericaforus.com](mailto: info@ericaforus.com)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Grassroots donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Erica for Us, P.O. Box 1236, Gaston, NC 27832.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.ericaforus.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.ericaforus.com/signup/did-your-information-change/?t=23&akid=553%2E3698%2E_PRQWK)

name: Jacky Rosen
subject: Can I ask you something?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rosen for Nevada
body:
We already know that if Mitch McConnell’s GOP flips the Senate in 2022, they’ll get right to work erasing Senate Democrats’ progress and impeding President Biden’s agenda for the country.
#
I've got a question for you, team.
**Are you ready to join me in the fight to keep the Senate blue?**
As Chair of the DSCC’s Women’s Senate Network this cycle, I am committed to electing women across the country. That means reelecting trailblazing leaders like Catherine Cortez Masto here in Nevada and expanding our Democratic majority by sending more women to the Senate.
We already know that if Mitch McConnell’s GOP flips the Senate in 2022, they’ll get right to work erasing Senate Democrats’ progress and impeding President Biden’s agenda for the country.
**[I need this team standing with me in the fight for the Senate majority. Can I count on you to make a $5 contribution -- and consider making it monthly to stay in this fight?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37615052/311855347/-2034701979?refcode=jr_em_nd_211016_1&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&city=Henderson&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MGJlNTgxOS1hZTJlLWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zQgEFRVgYmfrvipFDv4mn0XM6M1-ne0jikwHRFY_Gh0=)**

name: Senator Chuck Grassley
subject: U.S. Senate Campaign 2022
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mike Braun for Indiana
body:
Please Open Immediately

| [](http://links.mikebraunsenate.com/u/click?_t=f3dfddd5a2ed4356955cd9c969d3b9e3&_m=d0bbf57324df47a3bd8f70660ee38112&_e=6MmHT-coYXWk_RaXOwl846uhkW8b4XvW3pNsLpCfBywY1wNe8-3WaoLgxml81kC4S794f0pZvwCzxH8qvn7KwQ3YKNADgT2kjKD6ucBxQxYYTiEsWVEG-FAilZkDrP4dfI9VDC7h4263Hsz8dVsUenUP1ls7MwaI0marSyK5FtQGoYi8S5U3WKNj3VFlSEaZ4afZ6IaQ35h_I99c8P7lWXQMt-JK9SUZu61k5USN-KR_MZyoXqTR-Qbz4dcWZKynDHH5QJoH9faEl705QNnr2c9MOhjaSuzXbxgd3WCuCBVaOLixAoOgCjxpkBZaOHE7cObhAv8Cgq9TbTsAndMCOYLkRLB8dLK4XcnOGbgAn7RD-Dv9kA888KhgJdFQIiYPvOfAiyVgSXL1LKYGlyzvdfVB2aXFsVwWp_0c1pjqUt2v2CI9CA1l19GkijBhlsjbokMi6hoJI1fV0t1A6vhpxxn4Xna9J2GR7tL69u3_CYAWBaaxS3ooQX_0nwYOb1wQ)
---

Friends:

**I needed you to hear this from me personally:_I am running for re-election to continue representing the people of Iowa in the U.S Senate._ **
**_As we get the new campaign underway, Barbara and I want to share some of our favorite moments from previous campaigns. Check out the mash-up we made for you._** [](http://links.mikebraunsenate.com/u/click?_t=f3dfddd5a2ed4356955cd9c969d3b9e3&_m=d0bbf57324df47a3bd8f70660ee38112&_e=6MmHT-coYXWk_RaXOwl846uhkW8b4XvW3pNsLpCfBywY1wNe8-3WaoLgxml81kC4S794f0pZvwCzxH8qvn7KwQ3YKNADgT2kjKD6ucBxQxYYTiEsWVEG-FAilZkDrP4dfI9VDC7h4263Hsz8dVsUenUP1ls7MwaI0marSyK5FtQGoYi8S5U3WKNj3VFlSEaZ4afZ6IaQ35h_I99c8P7lWXQMt-JK9SUZu61k5USN-KR_MZyoXqTR-Qbz4dcWZKynDHH5QJoH9faEl705QNnr2c9MOhjaSuzXbxgd3WCuCBVdMsNwzOxSe_Pi049VJtY8Q3_eSKBaIJnt8VZa8giI6DqqJ-hnBBoRSBYENYt366e0xyhh1kRffrHwj-OMfRiPmqcwcZv1JFF4t6dNIoLQ5YdQcwPm17VS9Bcv6fEPEQPmzuqcf8hOI3ULasrRX5pFRgnTncTo4nuRR6_52W5wUWNGEiviZAktbQbGVyQxPPAp7B4Ofz-h8IN4obkJdqFS)

_Representing the people of Iowa is a great honor._ It is a privilege to listen to your concerns, and make our communities and our country stronger than ever. I am thankful for your support and want you to know that I never take that for granted. In these uncertain times of chaos and polarization, Iowa needs steady and effective leadership you can count on. We’ve accomplished a lot but there’s more work to do. Winning Iowa is key to taking back control of the United States Senate. We need to change course and get America back on track with Republican leadership.

As a farmer, I live life by a simple code: you keep working until the job is done. When you look at Washington today, you can see there is still a lot of work to do. I’m committed to making our country a better place for our kids and grandkids. I’m working as hard as ever.

**[I’m asking for your support so I can continue to bring common sense conservative values to Washington.](http://links.mikebraunsenate.com/u/click?_t=f3dfddd5a2ed4356955cd9c969d3b9e3&_m=d0bbf57324df47a3bd8f70660ee38112&_e=6MmHT-coYXWk_RaXOwl846uhkW8b4XvW3pNsLpCfBywY1wNe8-3WaoLgxml81kC4S794f0pZvwCzxH8qvn7KwQ3YKNADgT2kjKD6ucBxQxYYTiEsWVEG-FAilZkDrP4dfI9VDC7h4263Hsz8dVsUenUP1ls7MwaI0marSyK5FtQGoYi8S5U3WKNj3VFlSEaZ4afZ6IaQ35h_I99c8P7lWXQMt-JK9SUZu61k5USN-KR_MZyoXqTR-Qbz4dcWZKynDHH5QJoH9faEl705QNnr2c9MOhjaSuzXbxgd3WCuCBXumcCBDIKMuGROSR4Zx9Bu0347sU4QxoDShyCcyZ5Xh3u9KCU___Ef7_YfI_4mgFcVIB2boeFQN7c8JWx5QIYCPkcV0_qZzmvsvWsj1nxbjPVD0VnUTBYuSLi-x4GmSX84hpJ8OGcbeTx0fOrzCEAi_IswI7BtKrrUWoqanD3_eZyscYC1kBjalgwOxSX-0gue6EEQeCrM_74V283FjNYo)**

I work hard to earn your trust and Iowans count on me to do what I say I’ll do. That’s exactly what I’ve done, and will continue to do in the U.S. Senate. What you see is what you get.

So, I hope you will come running with me in this race. I know I’m geared up and ready to take on the Radical Left, are you?

clean_body: Please Open Immediately | Friends: I needed you to hear this from me personally:I am running for re-election to continue representing the people of Iowa in the U.S Senate. As we get the new campaign underway, Barbara and I want to share some of our favorite moments from previous campaigns. Check out the mash-up we made for you. Representing the people of Iowa is a great honor. It is a privilege to listen to your concerns, and make our communities and our country stronger than ever. I am thankful for your support and want you to know that I never take that for granted. In these uncertain times of chaos and polarization, Iowa needs steady and effective leadership you can count on. We’ve accomplished a lot but there’s more work to do. Winning Iowa is key to taking back control of the United States Senate. We need to change course and get America back on track with Republican leadership. As a farmer, I live life by a simple code: you keep working until the job is done. When you look at Washington today, you can see there is still a lot of work to do. I’m committed to making our country a better place for our kids and grandkids. I’m working as hard as ever. I work hard to earn your trust and Iowans count on me to do what I say I’ll do. That’s exactly what I’ve done, and will continue to do in the U.S. Senate. What you see is what you get. So, I hope you will come running with me in this race. I know I’m geared up and ready to take on the Radical Left, are you? | 2022 is about to be a big year. | "Grassley for Senate" | "Grassley for Senate" | "Grassley for Senate" | "Grassley for Senate" | "Grassley for Senate" | "Grassley for Senate" I love my work and I will always work harder than anyone on your behalf. Thank you and God Bless, Senator Chuck Grassley Paid for by Mike Braun for Indiana Don't want to receive our emails anymore?

I was fortunate that my hard work resulted in a scholarship to the University of California, Berkeley, but I know that not everyone is afforded the same opportunities.

I chose to run for Congress because I want every American to have equal opportunity, meaning affordable housing, healthcare, and schooling options.

body:
President Biden’s approval numbers are in free fall because Americans are seeing his ‘Build Back Better’ agenda for what it really is... [](http://links.mikeforwisconsin.com/u/click?_t=958424c79255456c93ed32354ec81cfd&_m=b5f85e5f01f1457a9831beb161740bd6&_e=E3YGzrQhqvS_qSrhNM3r6gSX8sY2-0sqYfMqj2_kMWsXl92H_UslUJPVRy4_kBAIsw6mFPjDD6LxPP_y7AyGiL1shsE1Z5FaQ-UyPrZCsnkXYkX2yGsDpOwrvO6kAGmSUa0GiZwAIC8QQxwY-NUEb_uLuKpkg4dFblLBq0wcrdvNT57wOk9RFRQmbNX1FzlFe8Nmz10wzTFq5evzwe7WoXD1qAcsCNge-4aRBSkNofOzaPduSlJETOjhD-OGkwlMYFXbkbJ4jql6HP2i6rUK9nI_zEOrmXbtAbUhV-1m8D3_-QYIPxGIvE0COSYOsOAepFrIuSXr_6VId0E5BYEucX7Ub-gt4flxjmO7aIaLqGNMwrgB1tzsqrxAcccRGYpkEipFA-pxZtKYSeCdXh6hOqN2IA9f3kxzOVxisY03QBCvVkek33VcBSsJmcRoN79XZkUds9h511K-38fauIPmDw%3D%3D) Peter, The numbers don’t lie. Fellow patriot,

Democrats love to virtue signal non-stop, and cancel anyone who disagrees with them. For a long time, it worked.

But now, conservatives know the Left’s game, and how to beat it. The key is to be PROUD of our beliefs, ignore the liberal attacks, and tell everyday working-class Americans what we believe -- and how our principles make their lives better.

Now, we’re seeing Republicans of all stripes filing to run for office, saying what’s on their mind, and defending our shared beliefs.

Let me be clear: The Republican Party welcomes anyone who shares our values. My friend Monica De La Cruz-Hernandez knows that, too. Last year, **Monica fell short just 6,588 votes from winning a seat in Congress that has been held by Democrats for over 100 years**. Had she been successful, Monica would have been the first Latina Republican ever elected to Congress from South Texas.

Patriots,

Taiwan is one of our strongest strategic allies in the world. They stand for Freedom and Democracy, while China stands for Communism and aggression.

China sees how weak the United States is under Joe Biden, and because of our disastrous exit from Afghanistan, China thinks they can get away with **ANYTHING** under this President.

**They are testing us.** It should be of concern to all Americans that China is in Taiwanese airspace. Right now, Taiwan needs the unequivocal support of its closest allies, not capitulation to the Chinese Communist regime. Biden should STAND STRONG with our allies, not COWER.

We **MUST** Take Back the House to hold Biden in check before his foreign policy blunders lead to more conflict.

**[We cannot hold Biden in check without your help. clean_body: 93 more to go... | Friend, It’s no surprise that as soon as Tony Evers and his allies saw our governor’s race was a 50-50 toss-up, they resorted to dirty tactics to try and stop our campaign’s building momentum. After they launched a lying attack ad against me, we set an emergency goal of 1,000 grassroots contributions for tonight’s mid-month deadline to fight back. And as it stands, we need just 93 more conservatives like YOU to step up and help us hit this goal. But we only have a few hours to go until the deadline. Can I count on your support at the final hour so that we can run ads of our own to cut through Tony Evers’ lies? Thank you, Rebecca Kleefisch Former Lieutenant Governor of Wisconsin Republican Candidate for Governor \- - - - Forwarded Message - - - - From: Rebecca Kleefisch Date: Thu, Oct 14, 2021 Subject: re: Latest attacks To: dpwillis67@gmail.com Friend, After our campaign came out of the gate strong and crushed our first quarterly fundraising deadline, it was only a matter of time before Tony Evers would resort to dirty tactics. Evers’ allies just launched an attack ad full of lies in an attempt to torpedo our campaign’s momentum after this race was labeled a 50-50 TOSS-UP. And with the mid-month deadline just around the corner, we can’t afford to fall short of our $25,000 goal and let these attacks go unanswered. It’s telling that Tony Evers and the Democrats' only attack against me is that I actually meet with and listen to our voters. He claims that my determination to personally listen to what matters most to YOU is creating “potential super spreader events.” Perhaps Evers just isn’t used to people attending his campaign events... But despite the ridiculousness of these attacks, we can’t allow the Left to continue fueling these lies with even larger ad buys. That’s why I’m asking for your help ahead of the mid-month deadline, to ensure we meet our $25,000 goal so that we can stamp out these lies here and now. Thank you, Rebecca Kleefisch Former Lieutenant Governor of Wisconsin Republican Candidate for Governor Paid for by People for Rebecca. PO Box 628284, Middleton, WI 53562

Hi folks, I’m Justin and I’m Michael’s campaign manager. This race has really ramped up so I wanted to reach out to you personally with an update on our path to victory. You’re a critical part of Michael’s team so I hope you’ll read through, **[then pitch in $10 before tonight’s mid-month deadline to re-elect Michael to the Senate and keep Colorado blue.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37615860/311860270/1929152467?refcode=AU_MFB_FR_GEN_MMG_AC_20211016_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMTA0MmY4Zi1iNjJlLWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=98bfh3r9EzbFVMhgUETADh6pVK04SKYdF0zPnfgIJCE=)** **WHERE WE ARE** Despite our slim Democratic majority and Mitch McConnell’s obstruction, Michael led the charge to expand the Child Tax Credit. The monthly payments helped one million Colorado children, kept three million children out of poverty nationally, and brought much-needed relief to parents. Now, Michael is determined to preserve this historic tax cut for lower- and middle-income families. Michael secured a historic investment in broadband — the largest federal broadband investment in our nation’s history — in the bipartisan infrastructure bill. This investment will help Americans compete in the 21st century economy and bridge the digital divide in Colorado’s rural and Tribal communities. Michael delivers for Coloradans. But while he’s fighting to make our economy work for everyone and combat climate change, far-right opponents are jumping into the race to defeat him... **THE STATE OF THIS RACE** Michael is excited to run on his record of delivering for working people, but he is facing attacks from all sides. The National GOP announced they raised $25 million last quarter to flip seats like Michael’s, and in the past month alone, three right-wing opponents launched their campaigns to defeat Michael.
* One is an insurrectionist who admitted to crossing the police line on January 6th, joked about lynching, defended the Three-Fifths Compromise, and has traveled the country in support of conspiracy theories about the 2020 election.
* The second is a wealthy Trump appointee who opposes the expanded Child Tax Credit, which has reduced financial anxiety and food insecurity for families as they continue to recover from the pandemic.
* The third is so wealthy that he already self-funded a quarter million dollars and hired top Trump consultants to run his campaign.

The GOP primary field is stacked with seven candidates ready to attack Michael to gain an edge in their race. Your support will help him fend off incoming attacks. **WHAT IT TAKES TO WIN** Michael is running a grassroots-driven campaign, folks. He doesn’t take donations from corporate PACs and federal lobbyists because that money often comes with strings attached and Michael answers to his constituents. To win this race and keep Colorado blue, Michael’s campaign has to reach and mobilize voters across the state while battling attacks from Michael’s opponents, Mitch McConnell, and dark money groups. It’s expensive work and with the National GOP raking in millions and wealthy self-funded opponents jumping into the race, we can’t rest for a moment. **Michael is counting on your support so he can continue fighting for Coloradans in the Senate. Please pitch in $10 — or what works for your budget — before tonight’s fundraising deadline.** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | **[Donate $10 now](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37615861/311860271/1929152467?express_lane=true&amount=10&&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&employer=&occupation=&refcode=AU_MFB_FR_GEN_MMG_AC_20211016_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMTA0MmY4Zi1iNjJlLWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=98bfh3r9EzbFVMhgUETADh6pVK04SKYdF0zPnfgIJCE=)**

clean_body: Take the first issues survey of Admiral Mike’s campaign today. | | | | Hey friend, we're hoping to hear from you before tonight's deadline: Admiral Mike's campaign launch has been so inspiring! He's already shown that he's the perfect leader to take on Chuck Grassley and help create a better future for every Iowan, Democrat and Republican alike. But what we haven't done yet is hear from you – the people who fuel this grassroots campaign, about the issues you think this campaign should focus on. We know Admiral Mike is well-positioned to take on Chuck Grassley and win. But if we're going to do that, friend, we’ll need you on our team and need your input to make this our campaign. Thanks for your input, Team Franken After over 36 years serving in the United States Navy, Admiral Mike Franken is home to unseat Chuck Grassley and become the next Senator from Iowa. | | PAID FOR BY MICHAEL FRANKEN FOR IOWA, INC. name: Team Schmidt
subject: Keeping up the momentum
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY DEREK SCHMIDT FOR KANSAS, INC
body:
Wow! It’s been another incredible week on the ground for Team Schmidt. Many more Kansas Legislators have joined our team and endorsed Derek Schmidt f Friend, **Wow! It’s been another incredible week on the ground for Team Schmidt.** Many more Kansas Legislators have joined our team and endorsed Derek Schmidt for Governor! **If you want to be a part of Team Schmidt too, click now to chip in and help support our campaign.** Check out what these Kansas Representatives had to say about Derek this week: _“Laura Kelly thought the best way to manage a pandemic was to shut down our churches and keep open abortion clinics. She destroyed family businesses and gave away $700 million in fraudulent unemployment payments. She’s stood by as the Biden administration has threatened Kansans with illegal vaccine mandates, created a crisis at our border, and is now weaponizing federal law enforcement to intimidate and silence parents who stand up for their children. Kansas clearly needs a change. Derek Schmidt will be a great governor who will stand with Kansas workers and families, fix the mess Laura Kelly will be leaving behind, and fight back against Joe Biden’s overreach and abuse of power. He has my full support and I urge all Kansans to join me.” _ **– JR Claeys, Kansas State Senator** _"I’ve known Derek Schmidt for a long time and have been encouraging him to run for governor for many years. When he used to join me on my radio show whenever he was in Salina, I would always end the segment asking whether he was ready to make a big announcement. I’m very excited he has made that announcement this year and is in the race, and I know he will make a great Governor of Kansas." _ **– Clarke Sanders, Kansas State Representative** _"I've worked closely with Attorney General Schmidt and his team in recent years to protect and expand our Second Amendment rights. Derek has been a strong defender of all of our liberties, and I know he has the right values when it comes to the major issues that face the State of Kansas. I'm proud to support him in the race to be our next governor." _ **– Blake Carpenter, Kansas State Representative** _"I've enjoyed working with Derek Schmidt in my role on the Judiciary Committee in the Legislature, and have admired the job he has done as our state's attorney general. He's always prioritized keeping Kansas families safe and respecting the rule of law and our state and federal constitutions. He will be a great law and order governor and has proven to be a leader Kansans can trust."_ **– Nick Hoheisel, Kansas State Representative** _“It is vital to elect Derek Schmidt the next Governor of Kansas amid this national political situation. Derek has shown his tireless defense of our Constitutional freedoms and support for western Kansas values. Derek has been very accessible to legislators for discussions. I urge everyone to vote Derek Schmidt for Governor in 2022!”_ **– Jim Minnix, Kansas State Representative** _"I've always appreciated the job Derek Schmidt has done as our attorney general. He's been responsive, helpful, and professional. He's done a great job and I am positive he will do a great job as governor as well." _ **– Boyd Orr, Kansas State Representative** _"In a time when our liberty, our economy, and our values are under constant attack, Kansans need a man like Derek Schmidt standing in the gap, standing for us. As Attorney General, Derek racked up an impressive, winning record in defending our freedoms against federal overreach. As our Governor, he will repair the damage done by the Kelly administration's disastrous Covid-19 response and restore the promise of Kansas for future generations."_ **– Pat Proctor, Kansas State Representative** _“I have known Derek for nearly 20 years. He has excelled as a Senator, including serving as Majority Leader, and now as our state’s Attorney General. He will make a great Governor of Kansas.”_ **– John Wheeler, Kansas State Representative** _“Derek Schmidt has been our attorney general for more than ten years, and he’s proven that he knows Kansas law, he knows the problems facing our state, and knows how to use the law to fix those problems and help Kansans.”_ **– Chuck Smith, Kansas State Representative** These are just a handful of the dozens of leaders from all across Kansas who are jumping at the chance to support Derek Schmidt to be our next Governor. Now, we need every single Kansas Patriot to join us in our fight to restore strong common-sense conservative values to our great state. **[Will you chip in now to help fight back against the Far Left and show we can do better in Kansas by electing Derek Schmidt as our next Governor?](http://links.schmidtforkansas.com/u/click?_t=4eb8bd5dcca54a0b993a2eb1eb42ba73&_m=d20763328bec41e1a54afe21cf417648&_e=HGKdRQZX8GfOCgeqWVI9uJv5L8zSiZqIb5wiuRQzCQUr9FCxbaObgLRg9rUKCZDKQR-Bts23MEENnmVuvP-PoSKWVF1OTzrcQ2TUJ7aHAIZx_5_M5iOVAygA0Hysytz0knlHdLsWIn4VEVtUTDoXWhSN4gbGSVr0z2kVKGGVsqT_TU-f7-ktw9IF6pjwhWYQNWw_s56QFEQtWqZUhviJL4xaA3BLEICH5AFmaA-ZVFnKNbiwhJAS_Z1370xfZOLTvwSfS4cBcfLgRNrMsSFi12zehJ18hgDrooTgScfp0USq4D07xOkWBtM5iRkpU5rJ600J2WWC9kiu4-YuMNyKvY_u5dLF2PAKMoFtJGY8LnTINdBZ8nB_2dF3zZA--R2i3KV9y3mvfozFqT9rjVZ8XRQa6w6MECGyXncbztkjfgSYX7-4Xy7qGpEXmGRxoijIzdMbUFkBODWJkfzLG8HWoev88ct2ei9bMTkAOn67vg87kw12SXSnMSYOR9zwxvcS)** [**DONATE NOW**](http://links.schmidtforkansas.com/u/click?_t=4eb8bd5dcca54a0b993a2eb1eb42ba73&_m=d20763328bec41e1a54afe21cf417648&_e=HGKdRQZX8GfOCgeqWVI9uJv5L8zSiZqIb5wiuRQzCQUr9FCxbaObgLRg9rUKCZDKQR-Bts23MEENnmVuvP-PoSKWVF1OTzrcQ2TUJ7aHAIZx_5_M5iOVAygA0Hysytz0knlHdLsWIn4VEVtUTDoXWhSN4gbGSVr0z2kVKGGVsqT_TU-f7-ktw9IF6pjwhWYQNWw_s56QFEQtWqZUhviJL4xaA3BLEICH5AFmaA-ZVFnKNbiwhJAS_Z1370xfZOLTvwSfS4cBcfLgRNrMsSFi12zehJ18hgDrooTgScfp0US9R8GUnCCdQmfklAn8Dk_nNbytblwYQR1vzjOqCy_8riKhlRl5Xv-HOQWiC_pJhbfaH8ILnoXggjE7gATtgXkEHQ_ifB9lITQ_81mlnsI8PXAzvLfZWIqNShZ6zh4olBmafondg5ArZFcZmkqbRqjWo11yBih2TA6as_bShppOzSR2gBFrnZ_qBY2Sf1IB3Lj7i1cAnrFhndvXZSixWave) Thanks, Team Schmidt | |

name: This is a critical moment in our campaign
subject: A bold voice for Ohio
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Marcy Kaptur for Congress
body:
Losing Marcy’s voice in Congress at a time when workers’ rights are under attack and the future of our planet is looking bleak would be a terrible mistake. |
Marcy Kaptur | |
---
[](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xNXS5KvDi5wrxDE5VytOtCwVpc5i8Die8BmDyLxt2uxyFvlWHboJDcHEqzAbKKK-DC7s1dsng7GWJjT7mJ489Q10JhbEHpQ7frs6ZYpQkFM-2Y_pSe60qTim-p5uREXVlorplBcnj4PkLvAWp-Gl0NQgu8KM7SwIj2eKwjg-c8OGvJ5dLm99ULZAkximsXrdPVvSYC2jjnq1csrxzOPewrGJQGkmKzQeX0jh0TWmF4RrWDL24kqeKG5_MEgDPKO5PkHd_hl_qoJA4Ui8DCDnG4n6SXZmTh1P6ZSeCTqxI8lv6kK7KQQIMJ1OmJVPc2UulnJsX13bDbuBIbbcUwG0Fdv6NSI93EUm3XzeK7FlsSqg/3g7/3RBO500CQZWJepWzCrchgg/h0/yBNsdGFsgytLtJ7Q7MMeROCCZC57_mirH9FfC8hgZm4)

| | Hey,
As 2022 draws nearer and the stakes grow higher, it is essential that we show the power behind our movement and maintain our momentum.

body:
|
| | | Fellow Conservative,

Right now, conservatives are fighting to win close races across this country, but I was just informed that we failed to hit our mid-month fundraising goal. That is why I am reaching out today pleading with you to step up and help us close this gap.

And because conservatives urgently need our help to win special elections in places like Ohio and Florida, I have been authorized to extend the fundraising deadline for the next 24 hours ONLY.

name: Dr. Jason Martin
subject: Tennessee values are Democratic values
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dr. Jason Martin for Tennessee
body:
It’s been such a joy and privilege to meet with Tennesseans in their home communities. For so long, working people and families have been ignored, but I believe — I know — that listening is what leadership is all about. | [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37616009/311861832/862036749?refcode=fl_email_fr_20211016midmonth1_JM_all_xx_hdr&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNDhkZjhkOC1iYTJlLWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XsN9RQX-mpoYMLSz-RI0dFLdPSHO5EzvBqFm43LlDK8=)

Hey Peter — greetings from Chattanooga, stop #47 on our 95 County Tennessee Thrives Tour! It’s been such a joy and privilege to meet with Tennesseans in their home communities. For so long, working people and families have been ignored, but I believe — I know — that listening is what leadership is all about. [_**Will you pitch in $10 or $20 to help us cover costs like gas and lodging on this tour?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37616010/311861833/-103157484?refcode=fl_email_fr_20211016midmonth1_JM_all_xx_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNDhkZjhkOC1iYTJlLWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XsN9RQX-mpoYMLSz-RI0dFLdPSHO5EzvBqFm43LlDK8=) | [Donate ➞](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37616011/311861834/-103157484?refcode=fl_email_fr_20211016midmonth1_JM_all_xx_btn&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNDhkZjhkOC1iYTJlLWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XsN9RQX-mpoYMLSz-RI0dFLdPSHO5EzvBqFm43LlDK8=)
---
I've had the opportunity to share my Democratic values with folks across the state, values that I believe are also Tennessee values: hard work, volunteerism, lending your neighbor a helping hand.
And I've also listened as folks have shared back with me the issues they want addressed. One of the things that makes me most excited about our campaign is the resounding agreement between regular Tennesseans about the areas we must address immediately. The top three that I’ve heard again and again are:
* **Fully funding our public schools** : Education is the ultimate equalizer; by reinvesting in our public education system, we can ensure equal opportunity for all of our children.

* **Expanding Medicaid and access to affordable healthcare** : No one should ever have to make a choice between putting food on the table and paying their medical bills.

* **Equity in job growth and job creation** : We need to invest in our workforce and develop a 21st century economy that provides work and fair wages for all.

When this tour’s over, we’ll build out a full policy platform that gathers everything we’ve learned from in-person conversations, surveys, and meetings with voters. **Because I know that to serve as a governor for everyone who calls our great state home — no matter their background or zip code — I’ve got to listen to them.**
[_**We’ve still got more than 40 counties to reach, though, and we need your help. Will you join us on our mission to be a voice for ALL Tennesseans by supporting our listening tour?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37616012/311861835/862036749?refcode=fl_email_fr_20211016midmonth1_JM_all_xx_l2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNDhkZjhkOC1iYTJlLWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XsN9RQX-mpoYMLSz-RI0dFLdPSHO5EzvBqFm43LlDK8=)
[**__**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37616013/311861836/862036749?refcode=fl_email_fr_20211016midmonth1_JM_all_xx_l2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNDhkZjhkOC1iYTJlLWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XsN9RQX-mpoYMLSz-RI0dFLdPSHO5EzvBqFm43LlDK8=)

clean_body: It’s been such a joy and privilege to meet with Tennesseans in their home communities. For so long, working people and families have been ignored, but I believe — I know — that listening is what leadership is all about. | = Hey Peter — greetings from Chattanooga, stop #47 on our 95 County Tennessee Thrives Tour! It’s been such a joy and privilege to meet with Tennesseans in their home communities. For so long, working people and families have been ignored, but I believe — I know — that listening is what leadership is all about. = | = I've had the opportunity to share my Democratic values with folks across the state, values that I believe are also Tennessee values: hard work, volunteerism, lending your neighbor a helping hand. And I've also listened as folks have shared back with me the issues they want addressed. One of the things that makes me most excited about our campaign is the resounding agreement between regular Tennesseans about the areas we must address immediately. The top three that I’ve heard again and again are: Fully funding our public schools : Education is the ultimate equalizer; by reinvesting in our public education system, we can ensure equal opportunity for all of our children. Expanding Medicaid and access to affordable healthcare : No one should ever have to make a choice between putting food on the table and paying their medical bills. Equity in job growth and job creation : We need to invest in our workforce and develop a 21st century economy that provides work and fair wages for all. When this tour’s over, we’ll build out a full policy platform that gathers everything we’ve learned from in-person conversations, surveys, and meetings with voters. Because I know that to serve as a governor for everyone who calls our great state home — no matter their background or zip code — I’ve got to listen to them.** = = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = | = | = ---|---|--- = | = | = — Dr. Martin | Paid for by Dr. Jason Martin for Tennessee Dr. Jason Martin for Tennessee 1831 12th Avenue S #175 Nashville, TN 37203 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please .

name: Rudy Giuliani
subject: re: FBI’s new targets
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Legal Defense Trust
body:
. . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . .
| [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58543234:JQO1oH2N4:m:1:3253819041:2E5BACF90DE26A540C9A81021A2BB975:r)
---
Peter,
---
I warned you this could happen.
---
After 7 FBI agents raided my apartment at 6:00 in the morning, I said that the FBI could one day target private citizens like you.
---
Now, Biden's goons at the Justice Department have unveiled a plan to go after concerned parents at PTA and school board meetings who oppose left-wing indoctrination.
---
I set up the Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund to fight for my freedom. But this battle against the Deep State isn't just about _my_ freedom. **_Yours is at stake, too._**
---
[**Please make a contribution to the Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund as I battle for my freedom and justice against the Deep State.**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58543234:JQO1oH2N4:m:1:3253819041:2E5BACF90DE26A540C9A81021A2BB975:r)

---
Biden's Justice Department has zero interest in upholding justice in America.
---
_They ought to be investigating voter fraud, the Biden Crime Family, D.C. corruption, sanctuary cities that harbor illegal immigrants, and infringements upon innocent Americans ' constitutional rights._
---
**_But instead, the Department of Justice has been weaponized to crack down on private individuals like me who have been deemed enemies of the Deep State._**
---
One report states that parents who oppose left-wing indoctrination of their children could even be classified as "domestic terrorists."
---
Our Founding Fathers would be rolling in their graves if they could see what's become of our nation's capital.
---
The citizens of our country are not supposed to be afraid of our government. Our government is supposed to fear We The People.
---
But so long as I'm standing, I will keep fighting back against the Deep State no matter how hard they try to intimidate me.
---
I hope you'll be fighting right by my side.

name: Powered By People (BetoORourke.com)
subject: [Photos inside] What our Student Fellows have been up to
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY POWERED BY PEOPLE
body:
[1]Powered By People

The past two elections have seen higher turnout in Texas than ever before
thanks to consistent organizing in every single Texas county. Now, we need
to build on that groundwork for 2022 and all the elections to come. That's
exactly what our Student Fellows are doing.

Young voters more than doubled their share of the early vote from 2016 to
2020 — and young Texans overwhelmingly lean Democratic. That's why our
Student Fellows are registering new voters and organizing on six college
campuses to elect leaders that truly represent the people of Texas.

Take a look:

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/47368?refcode=ema20211016-158303&t=1001&akid=158303%2E444211%2EBofxhk ]Picture of Student Fellows

Powered by People Student Fellows are organizing at Prairie View A&M
University, Huston-Tillotson University, Stephen F. Austin State
University, University of Houston, Texas State University, and Texas A&M
International University to register every new potential voter.

With students moving from different cities and states to attend school in
Texas, it's important to make sure everyone eligible is registered to
vote. And every single time our Student Fellows show up, new voters are
registered!

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/47368?refcode=ema20211016-158303&t=1002&akid=158303%2E444211%2EBofxhk ]Picture of Student Fellows

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/47368?refcode=ema20211016-158303&t=1003&akid=158303%2E444211%2EBofxhk ]Every grassroots donation from supporters
like you helps directly power this work. Will you make a $5
or more donation today to support our Student Fellows' work to register
new voters, engage young adults in our democracy, and flip Texas blue?

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/47368?refcode=ema20211016-158303&amount=5&t=1022&akid=158303%2E444211%2EBofxhk ]Contribute $5

Powered by People volunteers have been working hard to expand and protect
the rights of Texans all year. And since they've been back on campus, our
Student Fellows have been no exception. They're bringing the same energy
our movement had rallying for voting rights this summer directly to
college campuses.

It's plain and simple. While Powered by People is trying to include more
people in our democracy, Texas Republicans are trying to make it harder
for students to vote. Defeating bad actors in Texas isn't going to be easy
— it will take a multi-year effort centered around community organizing
and voter registration.

That's why Powered by People is doing the work now, with just over a year
to go until November 2022. [ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/47368?refcode=ema20211016-158303&t=1023&akid=158303%2E444211%2EBofxhk ]If you're ready to be a part of this
movement, will you make a donation of $5 or more right now?

Thank you for your support,

Powered by People

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/47368?refcode=ema20211016-158303&t=1024&akid=158303%2E444211%2EBofxhk ]Donate »

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to act. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://act.betoorourke.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1025&akid=158303%2E444211%2EBofxhk

clean_body: Under Joe Biden’s watch, gas prices have NEARLY... | | Friend, Under Joe Biden’s watch, gas prices have NEARLY tripled. In Joe Biden’s America, the oil and gas industry is under attack, and Americans are keeping less of their hard-earned money in their pockets. FIRST , he canceled the Keystone XL Pipeline his first day in office. THEN , he hides the radical ‘Green New Deal’ in his reconciliation bill. NOW , we’re facing rising prices in gas, energy, and complete distribution in shipping. America won’t survive another 6 months of Biden's disastrous economic and energy policies, let alone 3 more years. clean_body: | | | | | Folks -- even Trumpthinks Dean Heller is a phony! Trump just confirmed what we already know about Dean Heller: he will say or do anything for his own political gain. Dean Heller is still trying to tap into Trump’s far-right base -- from the dog-whistles in his announcement video, to his comments on wanting to copy the Texas abortion ban here in Nevada. | | | Folks, the GOP is ready to throw millions of dollarsto Dean Heller if it means unseating Gov. Sisolak. Polls show Steve neck-in-neck with Dean Heller, so we can expect him to keep kissing Trump's ring and riling up the MAGA base to try and close that gap. It’s crucial that this grassroots team pitches in so we can keep Trump cronies like Heller out of the Governor’s office.****** | | | | | | | | | | | | Thank you, Team Steve Sisolak | | If you'd like to support Steve Sisolak for Governor, you can | Paid for and Authorized by Committee to Elect Steve Sisolak Steve Sisolak for Governor** P.O. clean_body: We need your urgent help to pick up the pace to win this race and help Republicans take back the Senate majority! | Fellow American, I'm personally reaching out to you today with both good news and bad news. The good news is that in the final 5 weeks of the 3rd quarter - versus the full 12 weeks other campaigns had, with the help of grassroots conservatives, we were able to raise $3.75 MILLION. The bad news is the Democrat senator in Georgia just released his fundraising numbers: $9.5 MILLION in the last three months. Here's what one reporter tweeted: Senator Warnock raised more money in the 3rd quarter than any Senate candidate in the entire country - Republican or Democrat. And he already has $17.2 million in his campaign war chest! National Democrats are rallying behind Senator Warnock's campaign because they know Georgia WILL DECIDE the Senate majority in the upcoming election. Fellow American, we're facing the top funded Democrat in the country - so we can't afford to let our foot off the gas for a single day. The Senate majority is on the line, and we have a tough fight ahead. The Democrats are raising record amounts of money, but we will win if we have the support from conservatives like you. Thanks, Herschel Walker Republican Candidate for US Senate | | PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC. Don't want to receive any more of our emails? We hate to see you go, but ._

name: Dave Chase
subject: 👀 Trump is watching Ohio “very closely”
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tim Ryan for Ohio
body:
[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/46?t=1001&akid=1163%2E3611125%2EXvVL3o ][IMG]

“I’m watching Ohio very, very closely...They’re all for Trump -- it’s a
wonderful thing.” -- Donald Trump

Folks,

Straight from the horse’s mouth -- Trump is watching Ohio very, very
closely.

He confirmed what we already know: Ohio is a battleground state and a top
target for Republicans.

We HAVE to win Ohio to expand the Democratic Senate majority. [ https://act.timforoh.com/go/5380?t=1007&akid=1163%2E3611125%2EXvVL3o ]Can you
chip in what you can right now to counter the big money that’s about to
flood Ohio and help us flip this seat blue?

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/5380?t=1008&akid=1163%2E3611125%2EXvVL3o ]Donate $25 [ https://act.timforoh.com/go/5381?t=1009&akid=1163%2E3611125%2EXvVL3o ]Donate $50 [ https://act.timforoh.com/go/5382?t=1010&akid=1163%2E3611125%2EXvVL3o ]Donate $100 [ https://act.timforoh.com/go/5383?t=1011&akid=1163%2E3611125%2EXvVL3o ]Donate $200

And folks, Trump is right about Tim’s Republican opponents being all in
for Trump. JD Vance and Josh Mandel are too busy duking it out for Trump’s
endorsement to actually talk to voters about the issues.

The last thing Ohio needs is a Senator who’s in the pocket of Trump and
GOP mega-donors.

Ohioans deserve a Senator who will go to mat for them, who knows the
struggle workers face.

Tim will be that kind of Senator, but we need your help. The GOP is
throwing BIG money at this race because they know the Senate majority is
riding on it. [ https://act.timforoh.com/go/5380?t=1012&akid=1163%2E3611125%2EXvVL3o ]Can we count on you to chip in to build up our rapid
response program and keep our grassroots momentum going strong?

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/5380?t=1013&akid=1163%2E3611125%2EXvVL3o ]Donate $25
[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/5381?t=1014&akid=1163%2E3611125%2EXvVL3o ]Donate $50
[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/5382?t=1015&akid=1163%2E3611125%2EXvVL3o ]Donate $100

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/5384?t=1017&akid=1163%2E3611125%2EXvVL3o ]Donate $250
[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/5380?t=1018&akid=1163%2E3611125%2EXvVL3o ]Other Amount

Anything you can pitch in -- whether it’s $1, $25, or $50 -- makes a big
difference for our team. Thanks for helping us win this thing.

-- Dave Chase

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/47?t=1002&akid=1163%2E3611125%2EXvVL3o ][IMG]
We believe that emails are the best way for our organization to stay in
touch with supporters like you. But if you'd like to receive fewer emails,
[ https://act.timforoh.com/signup/Fewer_Emails/?t=1003&akid=1163%2E3611125%2EXvVL3o ]click here.

body:

We can't compete with the GOP's war machine, friend. So far, top Republicans and special interest groups have spent over $3 million dollars attacking our campaign, and most recently **One Nation, a McConnell-linked super PAC, pledged to spend $10 million to take back the Senate.** In the coming weeks and months, the Granite State will be flooded with record-breaking sums of dark money. **With Maggie down in the polls, this could tip the scales against us.** So here's the deal: while Republicans are relying on right-wing megadonors to buy this seat, we're running a people-powered campaign that depends on grassroots donors like you. But last night we fell short of our mid-month goal – missing even a small goal can be consequential in a race this tight. **That's why we're setting an emergency goal of $15,000 to close our fundraising gap and protect this vulnerable Senate seat.** **[Can Maggie count on you to chip in $5 today?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37616744/311868087/-214106137?refcode=e20211016_emerg-goal-a&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZTk2NmI5YS1jMTJlLWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=mHvyw1rODpnrBLhJJWGw9dgWCPxLmQWi0ViC1BDWXNE=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [Contribute $5](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37616745/311868088/-214106137?refcode=e20211016_emerg-goal-a&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&express_lane=true&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZTk2NmI5YS1jMTJlLWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=mHvyw1rODpnrBLhJJWGw9dgWCPxLmQWi0ViC1BDWXNE=)
