name: JusticeDemocrats.com
subject: 16 bucks
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

We just took a look at our progress toward our mid-month goal, and it’s
not looking good,
Peter. Not only are we $4,032 away
from the $15,000 we need to raise by midnight, but we’re also down $7,027
from where we were at this point last month.

There is one number we are really proud of though. The average contribution to
Justice Democrats in October so far is just $16.04.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/77169?t=1002&akid=20041%2E1203867%2ExYn9V0 ]Average Contribution is $16.04

While the establishment and their corporate candidates have average
contribution rates in the hundreds, $16.04 represents working people
giving what they can, when they can to our movement.

And the good news is that when you join other grassroots supporters and
chip in $3, $5, or even $16.04, we’ll be able to make up the difference
and hit $15,000 raised in no time. [ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/77169?refcode=em20211016-20041&t=1022&akid=20041%2E1203867%2ExYn9V0 ]Can you make sure we hit our goal
by midnight and chip in today?

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/77169?refcode=em20211016-20041&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1023&akid=20041%2E1203867%2ExYn9V0 ]Chip in $16.04

Every single grassroots contribution makes a huge difference because we
don’t take a dime from corporate PACs or billionaire benefactors. And with
our growing slate of progressive primary challengers, we need all the help
we can get.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/77169?refcode=em20211016-20041&t=1024&akid=20041%2E1203867%2ExYn9V0 ]So if you’re able to, can you please chip in to help us close the
$4,032 gap and help us meet our mid-month goal? Not everyone who reads
this will donate, but even just a couple of dollars will get us back on
track.

In solidarity,

Justice Democrats

Do not worry if you cannot afford to make a contribution — we understand that
this is a difficult time. If you’re struggling, you can find a food bank
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/28883?t=1025&akid=20041%2E1203867%2ExYn9V0 ]here. We appreciate everything you do to keep our movement strong.

Please stay informed and follow the most up-to-date recommendations from the
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/24438?t=1026&akid=20041%2E1203867%2ExYn9V0 ]Centers for Disease Control and your state public health department.

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20211016-20041-footer&t=1027&refcode2=20041_1203867_xYn9V0&akid=20041%2E1203867%2ExYn9V0

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://go.justicedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1028&akid=20041%2E1203867%2ExYn9V0

PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.
JusticeDemocrats.com
10629 Hardin Valley Rd, #226
Knoxville, TN 37932
Email us: us@justicedemocrats.com

subject: Send letters on behalf of Allison Russo 📬➡️
body:
We have to make sure our neighbors come out to vote! | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/28052e11a9aa/send-letters-on-behalf-of-allison-russo?e=400a181d5a)
---
| | | [ ](https://Allisonrusso.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8a3818e62f1e6e7a398f3ef29&id=eab117d55f&e=400a181d5a)
---
| | |
---
| Hi ,

**Research shows that neighbor-to-neighbor conversations are some of the most impactful political conversations you can have.** The campaign can pay for flashy mailers and TV commercials, but only YOU can help us send a letter to your folks.
---
| [SEND LETTERS TO GET OUT THE VOTE](https://Allisonrusso.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8a3818e62f1e6e7a398f3ef29&id=5f4d008fb1&e=400a181d5a "SEND LETTERS TO GET OUT THE VOTE")
---
| **_We've made it super easy to send letters_** to your neighbors about the importance of the upcoming election:
1. Open the [template letter](https://Allisonrusso.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8a3818e62f1e6e7a398f3ef29&id=cb7e77fd1a&e=400a181d5a), make a copy and personalize it (if you want!)
2. Click “[Take Action” on the Mobilize Sign Up](https://Allisonrusso.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8a3818e62f1e6e7a398f3ef29&id=e929c3652e&e=400a181d5a) and an email will be automatically generated for you to return your edited letter. Once received, the campaign will pull a list of targeted voters in your area and email you individual copies of the letters to voters
3. All you'll have to do it hit "print," sign the letters with a little note, and then address and mail them!

---
| [START SENDING LETTERS TO VOTERS NEAR YOU](https://Allisonrusso.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8a3818e62f1e6e7a398f3ef29&id=20e16b8505&e=400a181d5a "START SENDING LETTERS TO VOTERS NEAR YOU")
---
| Hand-addressed envelopes with a note from a neighbor, along with a return address folks can recognize, makes a huge difference in terms of reception. **_Letters should be mailed no later than October 25th, so sign-up today!_**
---
| [LEARN MORE AND SIGN UP NOW](https://Allisonrusso.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8a3818e62f1e6e7a398f3ef29&id=d98249a1f8&e=400a181d5a "LEARN MORE AND SIGN UP NOW")

name: Nancy Pelosi
subject: I've had it
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nancy Pelosi for Congress
body:
---
| | I’ve had it. I watched Trump threaten to run for President if Republicans retake the House. I watched Republican donors rush $86 MILLION to fund their scheme to do it. I watched them launch 400+ voter suppression bills to cheat the system and prevent Democrats from ever winning again. **[Now, I’m going to watch Republicans’ ploy completely BACKFIRE.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37617053/311869616/1694321165?refcode=20211016_em_fr_b2_pelosi_30_rs&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDIvMS84ODQ2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzODBjMTcwZC1jNDJlLWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=GfNo-dL7-4YPpGrOUXAWHYvS3XMDdTJ6VAESou-DRqw=)** **_[Here’s my plan: If 731 Democrats rush $15 before midnight, we’ll ECLIPSE Trump and Republicans' big plans of regaining power -- with a HISTORIC Democratic fundraising surge to defeat them. name: Deb and Jerry Finkenauer
subject: our daughter never quits
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Abby for Iowa Abby for Iowa
body:
| | |
---
Peter,
It's Deb and Jerry Finkenauer – Abby's parents. We wanted to take a minute to tell you a bit more about our daughter – **and why we know she's going to defeat Sen. Chuck Grassley and become Iowa's next senator.**
You see, Abby is a fighter. And there's no one she'll fight harder for than her family and her community. She won election to the Iowa House of Representatives at only 25 years old – and then four years later became the youngest woman to flip a U.S. House seat from Republican to Democratic. All along the way, she's been fighting for working families like ours.
Trust us on this: When Abby faces opposition, she doesn't falter. Instead, she toughens her resolve and works until she's found a path forward. And we are so proud to have stood by her through it all: knocking doors, passing out yard signs, and even baking nearly 1,000 cupcakes for a fish fry with seven presidential candidates. (Although most of the credit goes to Deb on that one!)
With all that resolve, and the fact that The Des Moines Register reported 64% of Iowans are ready for someone other than Sen. Grassley, we know our daughter has what it takes to win this race. **But with the Senate Republicans' campaign arm already having pulled in $76 million this year, Abby simply cannot compete without the grassroots support of people like _you_.**
**We've seen how things work in Iowa, Peter. The GOP will pour millions into our state to keep it red and stop Abby. We can fight back, and win, with your support.[So p](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37617151/311870019/805649176?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk273-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MzU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNjRiNzFjNC1jNDJlLWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=h6WS2rb7jJggZTVptnZXJdF7J7b3NxPTmXoXAM4M3qo=)****[lease, can you give $5 to our daughter's campaign so that she can defeat Sen. Grassley, flip Iowa blue and protect our Democratic Senate majority? We promise that your donation will go to the hardest-working candidate out there – and she won't let you down.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37617152/311870020/805649176?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk273-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MzU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNjRiNzFjNC1jNDJlLWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=h6WS2rb7jJggZTVptnZXJdF7J7b3NxPTmXoXAM4M3qo=)**

name: Trump News HQ
subject: Flawed and outdated?
body:
The events of the last year have no precedent in our nation’s history. They’ve shaken me, and I’m sure they’ve affected
_Sponsored message_
This sponsored message from Trump Train News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zmd4a6t9j0c96olntfm09iuibcvl9jg2jitfkbco_rp22sh2s8i66pj1c5i61o36cdh2bs) Dear Fellow American, The events of the last year have no precedent in our nation’s history. They’ve shaken me, and I’m sure they’ve affected you as well. Throughout it all, you may have noticed a recurring theme from the progressives in the media, Big Tech, and politics. They insist that the government designed by our Founding Fathers, as expressed in the Constitution, is **flawed** and **outdated** —not adequate for the challenges of our time. How should defenders of the Constitution, like you and me, respond to such charges? Well, a few early champions of the Constitution—Alexander Hamilton, John Jay, and James Madison—have given you the guide: _The Federalist Papers_. Written between October 1787 and August 1788 under the pen name Publius, _The Federalist Papers_ were originally published as newspaper editorials intended to explain the merits of the Constitution. Thomas Jefferson described _The Federalist Papers_ as “the best commentary on the principles of government which ever was written.” That means that defenders of the Constitution have no better help in understanding the principles of liberty underlying our Constitution than the words of the Founders themselves. **So, I’d like to send you our entire 10-lesson course, “ _The Federalist Papers_ ,”on DVD today with a donation of $100 or more to Hillsdale College.** _**“The Federalist Papers”**_ course comes in a beautiful DVD box set for viewing in your home or a small group. You might also find it useful for a homeschool curriculum or personal study. It’s taught by Hillsdale’s knowledgeable faculty and will deepen your understanding of this incredibly relevant document even more. The DVD can also make an excellent gift for a friend or family member unfamiliar with our nation’s founding principles of liberty. [](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2ztt7b4du44pudbkf4u18aks1hfb47oispn2hnc20_rp22sh2s8i66pj1c5i61o36cdh2bs) Supplies are limited, though, so get this special edition of **_“The Federalist Papers”_** on DVD today. Given that more than 200,000 people have taken this course already, you can bet the DVD box set won’t last long. Click here to learn more about this DVD and order your copy of _**“The Federalist Papers”**_ today: [**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-federalist-papers**](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zapmqj5fhdcjcjjumt0qcc9mvrgc8lfigsinrq3o_rp22sh2s8i66pj1c5i61o36cdh2bs) Warm regards, Bill Gray Class of 2001 Associate Vice President of National Donor Outreach Hillsdale College
---
Trump Train News

625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

[Click here to unsubscribe](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zvcaph2b8j1nf262pfhjri1hh06mna0s31qjm7b0_)

| | Team Members Wanted! Our Team is ready to grow, and we can use your help!Currently, we need the following positions filled:
* Field director- someone to head up our campaign’s grassroots organization. You will work with the team to design a field plan, which lays out tasks to achieve goals for voter identification, persuasion, and turnout among target groups. During the campaign, the field director manages field organizers and reports to the campaign manager.
* Field organizer(s)- A field organizer recruits, trains, and manages the volunteers in the grassroots effort to identify, persuade, and mobilize targeted voters. Field organizers also recruit other volunteers. Field organizers report to the field director and will be assigned specific geographical areas. Wa-03 is a huge district, geographically speaking.
* Outreach director- Our outreach director will be responsible for putting us in touch with "the people." You will be tasked with reaching out to groups our campaign needs to talk to i.e; people who have issues we can help with, and those who can help us. Our outreach director will work directly with the field director and organizers, as well as the campaign manager and candidate.

If you are interested in working with the campaign and you think you can fill any of these positions, please contact: Jason DiPane, 360-518-9172Jason@brenthennrich.com And if you know the person you think is perfect for the job, send them this! Let's Heal Washington!
---

name: Herschel Walker
subject: OUTRAISED
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC
body:
We need your urgent help to pick up the pace to win this race and help Republicans take back the Senate majority! |
---
Peter,

I'm personally reaching out to you today with both _good news and bad news._

name: Kevin Kiley
subject: Newsom Opposes Vaccine Mandate
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kevin Kiley for Assembly 2022 9458 Treelake Road, Granite Bay, CA 95746, United States
body:
|
---
Hi Peter, I've just published a new blog post: [End All Mandates](https://kevinkiley.nationbuilder.com/r?u=Bjc8XUdeJ9yV6eR3mI9Z6HRd5urWv8u8i-Pa-jQziork4ITqMo4EyvMHRc8Gdv7WhVPcWDq9uGRNNrgXt1rIaA&e=eff202566bfe6143aa18c9c627e100fe&utm_source=kevinkiley&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=oct_16_final&n=1) Gavin Newsom is asking a Court of Appeals to _remove_ the vaccine mandate for a union that gave him $1.75 million. At least now we know his exact price. I am demanding Newsom end every other mandate immediately. If it isn’t needed for his biggest donors, it isn’t needed for schoolchildren or anyone else. The _Babylon Bee,_ a satire publication, summed up the absurd reality: “Kids Form Union and Donate Millions to Newsom So They Won’t Have to Get Vaccinated.” At every turn, Newsom has let Special Interests dictate COVID policy. They shut down our schools, they bought their way out of lockdowns, and they’re buying their way out of mandates. One of those Special Interests, the SEUI union, gave $6 million to Newsom’s anti-Recall campaign. Yesterday, SEIU’s leader was arrested for embezzlement, fraud, and other felonies. The Sacramento Swamp is the grimiest in America. And Gavin Newsom has brought it to new levels of corruption and perversity. But Californians are fighting back like never before as our movement continues to grow. [Help me fight Newsom at the Capitol](https://kevinkiley.nationbuilder.com/r?u=09K6E4GvoPozZ73mzf50y5etLj1_9wCfyRoQ3wvVmv_IPFMzzv9WmdPghwMBSwX0KOu7WTw5uuSoUQzsIZxhqw&e=eff202566bfe6143aa18c9c627e100fe&utm_source=kevinkiley&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=oct_16_final&n=2) [Share this Post on Facebook](https://kevinkiley.nationbuilder.com/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6lpHI-UVcODcFSdMgu5zpAxmdb5f5-nI8ZK4CSy0djPWoDVTTwEjlqG9yFeMcajI6g&e=eff202566bfe6143aa18c9c627e100fe&utm_source=kevinkiley&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=oct_16_final&n=3) Kevin Kiley
[](https://kevinkiley.nationbuilder.com/r?u=yFGvxrZFfEAGNDSajUG67jFpOTi1EXIJZKzd_Af4NVQ&e=eff202566bfe6143aa18c9c627e100fe&utm_source=kevinkiley&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=oct_16_final&n=4)California Legislator
Paid for by Kevin Kiley for Assembly 2022 9458 Treelake Road, Granite Bay, CA 95746, United States
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](dpwillis67@gmail.com). To stop receiving emails, [click here](https://kevinkiley.nationbuilder.com/unsubscribe?e=eff202566bfe6143aa18c9c627e100fe&utm_source=kevinkiley&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=oct_16_final&n=5).

body:
We crunched some numbers.
# [](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/388?refcode=em20211016-3042-header&t=1&akid=3042%2E434096%2EERHTWO)
Check this out, Peter.
**A box of our brand new, union-printed campaign literature just arrived at our office in Pittsburgh.** Take a look! 👀
[](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/33197?refcode=em20211016-3042&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=3042%2E434096%2EERHTWO)
The team is pretty stoked about this. Because a fresh box of campaign flyers like these means our organizers can pass these out + keep spreading the word about John Fetterman's campaign to flip this seat blue and finally be that 51st Democratic vote in the U.S. Senate.
Here's why we're telling you this, Peter:
Each box of campaign literature costs the campaign around $200 bucks. Each box contains 2,500 flyers, give or take a few. **That means, by donating even $10 right now, you'd directly fund roughly 125 new flyers that are a potential entry point to our campaign for a brand new John Fetterman supporter.**
**Now that you've gotten an exclusive look at our brand new, union-printed campaign literature,**[**_will you donate $5 or any amount you can to help fund even more boxes for our organizers? Like we said, $10 = 125 flyers, meaning 125 more opportunities to reach a new voter for John Fetterman for U.S. Senate._**](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/33197?refcode=em20211016-3042&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=3042%2E434096%2EERHTWO)

Yours,

name: John Kasich
subject: We have to keep it up
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kasich for America, not authorized by any
body:
I'm disappointed in President Biden's progress so far in fulfilling the commitment that he made to the American people. [](http://links.johnkasich.com/u/click?_t=6a3b28686d0a4d77958e12349305a4fe&_m=b01187a2fd394656bfd632227e35b1f5&_e=peQtDr6nMcstvSIS37cUfU66j5za85gLr7LX-W2I-SM3Vhmm7JvADEAYZ7CUpPJct4PPWae4k-XSXpwawdD2iOM-J-JpyD_qFYWOf7OZp917n8uIpshSNnlSE3Pc5-HWOXNQ9wTHap6hZRe8FjgS_8EkNBrl5VmF9sRESMyVrbHjEn3YQKSNOmP4tv-nhupiA45le8u963LJtxpA0OgXJPl9yAaRL0DMVPuNoJLmLiQJhNy0_ozWC6RziRXB0NlweA4bhtWn3gALjiHpcrgjQQ%3D%3D) Peter - I'm disappointed in President Biden's progress so far in fulfilling the commitment that he made to the American people. The fundamental problem is that he didn't run for President to remake America or expand government the same way Presidents Lyndon Johnson and Franklin Roosevelt did. **He ran to bring us together - to stop the name-calling, the fighting and to get things moving again**. Why then have we seen the President standing idle as the extreme factions of his party grind things to a halt seeking a multi-trillion dollar expansion of government without a plan to pay for it? Why is he not demanding that House Democrats pass the bipartisan infrastructure bill right now that the U.S. Senate passed in August with 19 GOP votes? ([Watch my interview about this](http://links.johnkasich.com/u/click?_t=6a3b28686d0a4d77958e12349305a4fe&_m=b01187a2fd394656bfd632227e35b1f5&_e=peQtDr6nMcstvSIS37cUfSUO05GucQ_gp74aikNeCn0X5DQfoZolVbTimn_tZT0dljcv9-W-IwckajjhW9fYXjLr2DOUtKosCPgAqzYs_OjzBBOtDZosmJNN2oT-lq5FQgPTW9Bwj1_ojnA1FQp-gYMElfG2Iz53TbVT4UpV1sxKnPJKCI3OKU6ilRQjA-Vy70kkaBJcopjFpO8rqmQzF5w3Jat1m3Yn9ChbrPFxK-xhe_S3WvkuCZgx0QIs8uUuGvmQ3X1TeEHS0Dh344Ap5wrl0lik2ftrsi7LqwokQVLxKW4vKK5_ScTzdCWBVW8r)) At the same time, former President Trump continues to peddle false conspiracy theories about the 2020 election in an attempt to cling to his waning political power and the GOP leaders are so terrified of him that they continue to sit idly by as he tries to rip the Republican Party apart. **Peter - we have to continue to speak out and fight to get our government working again**. The stakes are too high for us to just sit by and watch this continue. I'm out there every day raising awareness about these issues and doing what I can to make a positive impact - to restore sanity to Washington. [But I need your help to keep up the fight](http://links.johnkasich.com/u/click?_t=6a3b28686d0a4d77958e12349305a4fe&_m=b01187a2fd394656bfd632227e35b1f5&_e=peQtDr6nMcstvSIS37cUfSbmQS0F4d-3U3hGB17UbCK6fwk4OoWA0vQi63sc15cIlwltXkziJRO_RtpH6a_UM4hdtU-0Br0TPypeHLd0v9NnOltrGphkdkgLgW-6R-bE1s_PiftXGT44099EUERf5EMbXqKZIVXiO3xg17BM8Z6IkNqfcYqLyTP_K8M0AsIBInic7tByT8SuigPJ2visS7558U6P28Yei1ajTrrwy9vwJ5RaRq1CPvzcMA-Tp1o_43hjDihfbeYxXEEtHJJfQg%3D%3D). The funds we raise go directly into our advocacy efforts and that's why I'm reaching out today to [ask you to consider making a donation right now](http://links.johnkasich.com/u/click?_t=6a3b28686d0a4d77958e12349305a4fe&_m=b01187a2fd394656bfd632227e35b1f5&_e=peQtDr6nMcstvSIS37cUfSbmQS0F4d-3U3hGB17UbCK6fwk4OoWA0vQi63sc15cIBYSJ86odCRD3sUBOup1ZoKMs5UkKT7UHMVEKCPDSClkjJ7dID3pvn5oTgltpmTItNwsnrIsjiL1U9zoXP831-ye-NDkjO8ltYj3fWn6lhOtgp8kRl3zSu8o-B4WJvCaJ2JXYeq8DdwH8ok-hHBMTrbW3gpXsy0l22pekadqGIP6ekyfF8AAJlKyaK5gk84qqVQzPDLiWmExoe5Yery4S4Q%3D%3D) to help. I'm counting on you. [Donate Now](http://links.johnkasich.com/u/click?_t=6a3b28686d0a4d77958e12349305a4fe&_m=b01187a2fd394656bfd632227e35b1f5&_e=peQtDr6nMcstvSIS37cUfSbmQS0F4d-3U3hGB17UbCK6fwk4OoWA0vQi63sc15cIJxp29EjwLO7pe9iy90Gs9W5c7-zugQzQXXzEFABBSqVdfa5jF7QBH3SSgsFdlMNUJwWKPI6iXv8ZZn2iuQQ8ei05IMapSZmj-ulrsPnY3zrGsNSuYFMQ71wWFG982KC9MtH1-kIgkKrDzzeqxtXx_EBwW4FhMaPgAqHCF78Ru5aQrqY50BVGDOwz-pdkI6TYH1Shnfj1JqIPoNC5EmV51Q%3D%3D) I'm so appreciative of all the work you're doing to heal the divisions in our country and get our government working again for all of us. Thank you! -John Paid for by Kasich for America, not authorized by any
candidate or candidate's committee.
www.JohnKasich.com

Friend,

As Ronald Reagan said, freedom in this country really is never more than one generation away from total extinction.

**_And considering the radical Democrats of today, that last generation could be ours... we’ve never been so close to socialism._**

_**[Help me FIGHT BACK against the liberal socialists](http://links.jasonforvirginia.com/u/click?_t=b7c680598d5648c3aaffcf8cea32abf4&_m=fc8ff96351584ed5b9b445631c5b54c3&_e=Dyj4hXSSrtB7Fo_SaHt-z-LvOBIh16ikJrAjLjGF5ztkfLdkv8gmAo-unl3SC2SZr8_0X8x2StlZV2AkftbJd1kwhD9HOLYEG4oxv2s99Mrr4aQ36KcW-oeQt_IOEyiQFmG9b9ExhY_n9STDQQM3lIPTMzEhT-OQNR9AiviMKFk0vUUShucqHfeHELUO7LQx8A-wuSLAkgkDQN70ZZjIutDQVkiS_cOxtBtKw3if39eToCy33p3CI0_QrnLyja6Fpzs3pCe1Bjf1I15GFwN3Bw74HyOs4RFGlMyeo8iMOyp0oEetjFD9siZ3i9m4JXHHZfRSQofiNZzc7HcdIsq0yrfuAZ5CYlC15THWp8Mi_73Xzkt5LrYuUHDmzXghgwHnDbQKSIyFqUT4eSloMBL7rEgrEoW9Kw-GCLGCIHuyCjnjpSjGWTI3kUi2pbU_7U_xpP3dodjviroayD489x5_Xw%3D%3D)**_

But we can't let our country fall into the left’s dystopia. **It will take ALL of us to stop it and it all starts with the election here in Virginia.**_[**→ CHIP IN NOW**](http://links.jasonforvirginia.com/u/click?_t=b7c680598d5648c3aaffcf8cea32abf4&_m=fc8ff96351584ed5b9b445631c5b54c3&_e=Dyj4hXSSrtB7Fo_SaHt-z-LvOBIh16ikJrAjLjGF5ztkfLdkv8gmAo-unl3SC2SZr8_0X8x2StlZV2AkftbJd1kwhD9HOLYEG4oxv2s99Mrr4aQ36KcW-oeQt_IOEyiQFmG9b9ExhY_n9STDQQM3lIPTMzEhT-OQNR9AiviMKFk0vUUShucqHfeHELUO7LQx8A-wuSLAkgkDQN70ZZjIutDQVkiS_cOxtBtKw3if39eToCy33p3CI0_QrnLyja6Ff7xXqR67kUv8o3-A8oXHf3s5M27llQVr6-maXHoFqkEvznCGABEtdn48izZrH2SgMWBShaYVReyzp2QOI6HjOZ3JnkANmVc6LkMK8pE0n6Q7TYNfA1SOaOWzIBi2T0pkx4rAGQ5zCwkMg-C0sYCQntjI3xcAUCAC8IOXW2yeAec_FebI_62g_M5Zw0iCYJWIrwyWLhhK54OuDPbgzGOrlQ%3D%3D)_

-Jason Miyares

2O,OOO RESPONSES NEEDED TO HIT MY GOAL: | | | | **YOUR URGENT RESPONSE REQUESTED:**

We just launched our Official October Priorities Survey.

And since you're one of our best grassroots supporters from your area, we're counting on your input to develop our winning strategy straight away.

**Will you record your input before 11:59 PM tomorrow?**
---
[YES! ->](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/Ra_Vfxgz2~f-) | | [NO ->](https://links.e.dccc.)
---|---|---

Our Democrats are in dire straits:

_\-- The GOP is**SURGING** just weeks before Virginia's crucial election.

\-- House Republicans have shattered **SEVEN** fundraising records in a row.

\-- And our polling lead for the House Majority has completely **EVAPORATED**._

But we haven't given up hope \-- because we know we have this incredible grassroots team by our side every step of the way.

Feedback from supporters like you powered our victories in 2020 when we **HELD** the House, **FLIPPED** the Senate, and **DEFEATED** Donald Trump.

And now, even as Republican momentum surges nationwide, we know we can win again -- _but**ONLY** if we're able to develop a strategy powered by your priorities once again._

**That 's why we just launched our October Priorities Survey and why we're asking for your feedback straight away:**

[**Can we count on you to help develop our winning strategy to save our House Majority by taking our October Priorities Survey before midnight tomorrow? **](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/XX_wMD9b7kC~)

clean_body: Can you help develop our winning strategy to save our House Majority by taking our October Priorities Survey before midnight? 2O,OOO RESPONSES NEEDED TO HIT MY GOAL: | | | | YOUR URGENT RESPONSE REQUESTED: We just launched our Official October Priorities Survey. And since you're one of our best grassroots supporters from your area, we're counting on your input to develop our winning strategy straight away. Will you record your input before 11:59 PM tomorrow? | | ---|---|--- Our Democrats are in dire straits: \-- The GOP isSURGING just weeks before Virginia's crucial election. \-- House Republicans have shattered SEVEN fundraising records in a row. \-- And our polling lead for the House Majority has completely EVAPORATED. But we haven't given up hope \-- because we know we have this incredible grassroots team by our side every step of the way. Feedback from supporters like you powered our victories in 2020 when we HELD the House, FLIPPED the Senate, and DEFEATED Donald Trump. And now, even as Republican momentum surges nationwide, we know we can win again -- butONLY if we're able to develop a strategy powered by your priorities once again. That 's why we just launched our October Priorities Survey and why we're asking for your feedback straight away: | | | ---|---|--- Thanks, DCCC Paid for by the DCCC | 430 South Capitol Street SE, Washington, DC 20003 | | www.dccc.org | Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.

body:

| | **_BREAKING:_ New Trafalgar Group poll has Donald Trump’s handpicked candidate for governor in razor-thin lead:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37617868/311874622/-2023814932?refcode=20211016.8_TEA_10DV&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkZWRmNTc2Yy1jZjJlLWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8wVWVrVMMs4AKDNACI-l9YsS8Hc0daFD2MMpiTJNzf0=)** | **[Chip in to help Terry pull ahead →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37617869/311874623/-2023814932?refcode=20211016.8_TEA_10DV&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkZWRmNTc2Yy1jZjJlLWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8wVWVrVMMs4AKDNACI-l9YsS8Hc0daFD2MMpiTJNzf0=)**
---
Another poll from a top-rated _FiveThirtyEight_ pollster has Terry losing to our Trump-endorsed opponent.

We have to be honest, Derek — this is NOT the news we wanted to see, especially with less than three weeks to go in this race and Virginians already voting.

But the game is far from over, Derek — **this latest poll also tells us that some voters are still undecided, and _whoever can persuade those undecided voters will be the winner of this race._**

_**[So right now, we need to step up to the plate. Please chip in any amount right now to help us ramp up our voter outreach efforts for the final weeks.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37617870/311874624/-2023814932?refcode=20211016.8_TEA_10DV&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkZWRmNTc2Yy1jZjJlLWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8wVWVrVMMs4AKDNACI-l9YsS8Hc0daFD2MMpiTJNzf0=)**_

At this point, there is nothing more important than reaching voters and talking to them about Terry McAuliffe’s vision for Virginia.

And we’re running a massive field operation, Derek.

But here’s the thing: _Republicans are running a massive field operation, too._

The RNC is spending huge sums of money, and we already know that Glenn Youngkin has promised to spend $75 million before the race is over.

So we’ve got to be able to match them — _and then rise above them._

It's crucial we have the resources to go toe-to-toe with them. | "Jim Lamon for Arizona" --- | "Jim Lamon for Arizona" --- | "Jim Lamon for Arizona" --- | "Jim Lamon for Arizona" --- | "Jim Lamon for Arizona" --- | "Jim Lamon for Arizona" --- Thanks for anything you can chip in, and for all you're doing. — Team Jeff TED BUDD IS THE TRUMP-ENDORSED REPUBLICAN CANDIDATE FOR U.S. SENATE IN NORTH CAROLINA Paid for by Ted Budd for Senate Copyright © 2021 Ted Budd for Senate, All rights reserved.

Friend, Tina Smith here. I serve in the U.S. Senate with Martin, and it’s his 50th birthday tomorrow! **[I’m reaching out to ask if you’ll chip in to help his team meet their goal of bringing in donations from all 50 states before his birthday ends.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37618026/311875330/-539429065?refcode=AU_MTH_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20211016_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1YmEzODQ0MC1kNDJlLWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=c3OsDoFKCHRvb0D_B-PP1BgD9KkWLSc8FmZcrVZzY0o=)** Martin and I share a strong New Mexico connection. I was born in New Mexico and grew up in Santa Fe, and my Dad Harlan, who is 91, and my brother and his family live in Santa Fe today. I visit whenever I can, and still love to hike in the foothills above the house where we used to live on Cerro Gordo Road. Now, I’m a longtime and proud Minnesotan, and proud to represent Minnesota in the U.S. Senate. But I know firsthand that both our states have amazing parks and wilderness areas (like Minnesota’s Boundary Waters and the Gila Wilderness.). This is why Martin and I share a commitment to protecting public lands and wild places in our state and in every state. Martin and I are both determined to use our seats in the U.S. Senate to deal with the climate crisis and put the United States on a path to a clean energy future, so our children and grandchildren can also enjoy magical places like the Boundary Waters. **So, I’m asking: Will you chip in any amount ahead of Martin’s 50th birthday to prove that support for our work for a clean planet stretches across all 50 states, including your state? name: Ryan Girdusky
subject: Resign, Recall, Replace
disclaimer_text: Paid for by 1776 Project PAC
body:
Peter, Will you join Tucker Carlson, Laura Ingraham, and Donald Trump Jr. In supporting our campaign to take back our schools from the radical socialist Left? [**_We need your help as we launch a nationwide effort to replace socialist, anti-American school board members with Patriots. Will you please support us?_**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58545042:6ZMQdH2N7:m:1:3253819041:22A02A4D9A916A8652E67E928FE673CA:r) For too long, the Left has worked to infiltrate schools and indoctrinate our kids with hateful "critical race theory" lessons. **As you may know, Critical Race Theory or "CRT" teaches our children to ****hate****our country,****hate****our history, and****hate****our American values. ** It's being taught in every state across the nation, and it MUST be stopped. If we're not careful, we will soon wake up in a country run by the generation that was trained by their teachers to hate America. And they'll work to destroy everything our country stands for. And friend, you may not have seen it happening at the time, but for too long Republicans have neglected local races and instead focused on "BIG" races for President, Governor, and Congress. **_But in the process, we 've neglected smaller local races - like school board - that are often not publicized._** One of the reasons these races get overlooked is that they're discussed as "non-partisan." What that means is radical leftists get to quietly slip into a position of power and waste your tax dollars on "equity" equity consultants and train your children and grandchildren to HATE America. That's the bad news: our nation is under assault by the left, and our children are their number one target. But here's the good news. We can and will stop the radical left from corrupting the minds of an entire generation. My name is Ryan Girdusky, and I founded the 1776 Project PAC to take back our local school boards and ensure that our children are taught to love and respect America. **Here 's my ****_3R 's Campaign Battle Plan:_****_ _** **_Resign:_** we'll turn up the public pressure with TV, Radio, and Print media campaigns calling for far left school board members to quit. **_Recall:_** we'll help collect petitions signatures and aid local parents, grandparents, and concerned taxpayers in efforts to recall radical school board members who must be removed from officed **_Replace:_** We'll support the campaigns of pro-America conservatives who run for local school board against liberal pro-CRT school board members. [_**But we can 't roll out this plan without your support. Will you rush in $17.76 to the 1776 Project PAC ahead of the 40+ November elections we're targeting?**_](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58545042:6ZMQdH2N7:m:1:3253819041:22A02A4D9A916A8652E67E928FE673CA:r) Now, you may not be familiar with me... But you're almost certainly familiar with Tucker Carlson, Laura Ingraham, and/or Donald Trump Jr. They know how effective the 1776 Project PAC will be, and you can take their word for it! **> >>> Tucker Carlson:**** "**Parents have almost no support, _but now they do_. The **_1776 Project PAC_** _ _ is a political action committee designed to help school boards and communities elect sane people." **> >>> Laura Ingraham:****** "For all the parents out there looking to reclaim your local school boards from radical leftists - help is on the way - a new political action committee called the **_1776 Project_** is going to support school board candidates who oppose indoctrinating kids with things like Critical Race Theory." **> >>> Donald Trump Jr.:****** "The **_1776 Project_** is the very first Political Action Committee of is kinds - specifically created to take on this sinister attack on our way of life from within our own communities by working to take local schools boards out of the hands of these America-hating radical liberals..." Even the failing and biased New York Times admitted that we "lit a fire" that is only growing as more conservative patriots like you join the fight in supporting the **1776 Project PAC.** **After 30 years of left-wing billionaires like George Soros flooding cash into local school board races, we finally have a way to fight back with the 1776 Project PAC.** [_**Help us fight back against George Soros and the radical socialist left in our school boards with a generous contribution of $17.76, $25, $50, and $100.**_](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58545042:6ZMQdH2N7:m:1:3253819041:22A02A4D9A916A8652E67E928FE673CA:r) In closing, my friend Tucker Carlson said "If you're thinking of writing a check to [another group] maybe you should pause and send it to Ryan Girdusky instead." With your help, we will rid our schools of hateful Critical Race Theory by ridding our school boards of radical left-wing activists who despise our Country, our Constitution, and our Conservative American values. Sincerely, Ryan Girdusky P.S. I know you may not know anything about me, but I hope that the endorsements from incredible conservative leaders like my friends Tucker, Laura, and Donald Trump Jr. give you confidence in my dedication to the mission of taking school boards back from radical liberals. [_**Will you invest in the future of our country by making a generous contribution to the 1776 Project PAC as we fight to Resign, Recall, or Replace far-left indoctrinators? **_](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58545042:6ZMQdH2N7:m:1:3253819041:22A02A4D9A916A8652E67E928FE673CA:r) [**DONATE NOW**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58545042:6ZMQdH2N7:m:1:3253819041:22A02A4D9A916A8652E67E928FE673CA:r) [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58545042:6ZMQdH2N7:m:1:3253819041:22A02A4D9A916A8652E67E928FE673CA:r) **[Please consider making a critical donation to the 1776 Project PAC today](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58545042:6ZMQdH2N7:m:1:3253819041:22A02A4D9A916A8652E67E928FE673CA:r)** Paid for by 1776 Project PAC
184 7th Ave #106, New York, NY 10011 Not Authorized by any candidate or campaign committee click **[here]({{unsubscribeUrl}})** to unsubscribe

Even the failing and biased New York Times admitted that we "lit a fire" that is only growing as more conservative patriots like you join the fight in supporting the 1776 Project PAC. After 30 years of left-wing billionaires like George Soros flooding cash into local school board races, we finally have a way to fight back with the 1776 Project PAC. In closing, my friend Tucker Carlson said "If you're thinking of writing a check to [another group] maybe you should pause and send it to Ryan Girdusky instead." With your help, we will rid our schools of hateful Critical Race Theory by ridding our school boards of radical left-wing activists who despise our Country, our Constitution, and our Conservative American values. Sincerely, Ryan Girdusky P.S. I know you may not know anything about me, but I hope that the endorsements from incredible conservative leaders like my friends Tucker, Laura, and Donald Trump Jr. give you confidence in my dedication to the mission of taking school boards back from radical liberals. name: Charlie Kirk, TPUSA
subject: We need to win this battle on the campuses
body:
By now, I’m sure you're as furious as I am with the White House’s absurd and illegal COVID vaccine mandate. [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c490%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=4WZ5%2bLZ0LqFegSGBcPgTRw&sysid=1)
[](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c66187%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=fl6zy%2fKEL%2fdN1v6IC1OWNw&sysid=1) Fellow American, By now, I’m sure you're as furious as I am with the White House’s absurd and illegal COVID vaccine mandate. The federal government has **_NO POWER_** to get involved in your medical decisions. **__PERIOD_!_** But for millions of college students in America today, it’s not just the federal government they have to worry about. **In fact, more than 2,500 colleges and universities are __FORCING__ students to get the COVID vaccine... __DEMANDING__ that they publicly share their medical history... and __BANNING__ them from school if they don’t comply!** My friend, this is the pattern for vaccine mandates across America--including Joe Biden’s. And if we don’t stand up against it now, there’s no telling how aggressive the federal government will get in their quest to force this vaccine on you and me whether we want it or not. [**_That’s why Turning Point USA and our army of 400,000 student activists are leading the battle against forced COVID vaccines on campus. Will you stand with these students today by signing TPUSA’s National Open Letter Against Forced COVID Vaccinations?_**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c66188%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=bPyZ07%2fvnGHN12y3IZlxSQ&sysid=1) [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c66187%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=fl6zy%2fKEL%2fdN1v6IC1OWNw&sysid=1) To ensure that students are ready to win the fight for freedom against radical college administrations, we’ve launched a **“NO FORCED VAX”** campaign and created engaging and educational activism kits that we’re shipping out to students every week. [**Your signature right now will help complement that effort by showing these Leftist university administrators just how many Real Americans are opposed to their radical policies.**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c66189%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=%2f5%2bmsJ8pus8nqEpqTaBqgg&sysid=1) This move by the universities is not about vaccines **_AT ALL_**. It’s about freedom, choice, information, and constitutional rights. Young and healthy students --the least affected by the disease -- must be free to decide what is best for them alongside their doctors... not college administrators or bureaucrats. The same goes for all Americans, but the Biden administration has watched what these universities have been able to get away with--and put their policies on steroids. As I write this email, thousands of students have been denied reentry to their campuses until they can show proof of vaccination. One student at Rutgers was even locked out of his __ONLINE__ college classes until he takes the vaccine! **If we let these schools exercise this kind of power over their students, I hate to see what the White House comes up with next!** We must win this campus battle right now, or we’ll be fighting it on our own doorsteps. [**Please partner with TPUSA _NOW_ in the fight against forced COVID vaccinations! With your signature on the National Open Letter today, you’ll help turn up the heat on these radical universities and stand with conservative students across America as they defend their freedom.**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c66180%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=I3fVC0OLEv9VJV5blz%2bgeg&sysid=1) [**Stop Forced Vaccination!**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c66181%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=RlzSPCbLaRgZmqe8tAPXoQ&sysid=1) Thank you for your support! For America, Charlie Kirk Founder & CEO Turning Point USA 4940 East Beverly Road
Phoenix, Arizona 85044
---
_107 S West St. #826, Alexandria VA 22314_
_[Unsubscribe](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/OptOut.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c490%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=4WZ5%2bLZ0LqFegSGBcPgTRw&sysid=1)_

[](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/CB.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c490%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=4WZ5%2bLZ0LqFegSGBcPgTRw&sysid=1)

name: Virginia EMERGENCY (via info@unitedemocrats.org)
subject: HUMILIATING defeat
disclaimer_text: Paid for by UNITEDemocrats PAC

# _How to volunteer this weekend:_
_Plus: Meet Allison in Wilmington, OH on Monday_
[](https://Allisonrusso.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8a3818e62f1e6e7a398f3ef29&id=3498073db9&e=400a181d5a)
## _Knock on Doors:_
* [**Athens Weekly Canvass**](https://Allisonrusso.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8a3818e62f1e6e7a398f3ef29&id=8c8e975061&e=400a181d5a) _, Saturday and Sunday at 10am, 12pm, and 2pm_
* [**Grove City Weekly Canvass**](https://Allisonrusso.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8a3818e62f1e6e7a398f3ef29&id=3a1d03d108&e=400a181d5a) , _Sunday at 1pm_
* [**Hilliard Coordinated Canvass**](https://Allisonrusso.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8a3818e62f1e6e7a398f3ef29&id=50acbee25a&e=400a181d5a) , _Saturday at 9:30am and Sunday at 2pm_
* [**Columbus Weekly Canvass**](https://Allisonrusso.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8a3818e62f1e6e7a398f3ef29&id=10eef6d376&e=400a181d5a)**,**_Sunday at 1pm_
* [**London Weekly Canvass**](https://Allisonrusso.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8a3818e62f1e6e7a398f3ef29&id=ee6526f567&e=400a181d5a) , _Sunday at 1pm_
* [**Pickerington Weekly Coordinated Canvass**](https://Allisonrusso.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8a3818e62f1e6e7a398f3ef29&id=f778b76bd3&e=400a181d5a) , _Reply for address_
* [**Ross Co. for Russo Canvass**](https://Allisonrusso.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8a3818e62f1e6e7a398f3ef29&id=41d9e3d7f5&e=400a181d5a) _, Sunday at 2pm_
* [**Victorian Village GOTV Canvasses**](https://Allisonrusso.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8a3818e62f1e6e7a398f3ef29&id=ca6aa1ca7b&e=400a181d5a) _featuring Rick Neal, Saturday at 10am and Sunday at 12pm_

| [VIEW ALL CANVASSES](https://Allisonrusso.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8a3818e62f1e6e7a398f3ef29&id=db9d5d1dc3&e=400a181d5a)
---
## _Make Phone Calls:_
* [**GOTV Virtual Phone Bank**](https://Allisonrusso.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8a3818e62f1e6e7a398f3ef29&id=b6ebd42627&e=400a181d5a)**with OPAL!**
* _Trainings are Sunday at 4pm and Tuesday at 6pm_
* _Once trained, make calls every day of the week!_
* [**Rural Voters for Russo Virtual Phone Bank**](https://Allisonrusso.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8a3818e62f1e6e7a398f3ef29&id=7fc2688b38&e=400a181d5a)
* _Trainings are Monday and Wednesday at 6pm_
* _Once trained, make calls every day of the week!_
* [**Seniors for Russo Virtual Phone Bank**](https://Allisonrusso.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8a3818e62f1e6e7a398f3ef29&id=c099c67217&e=400a181d5a)
* _Trainings are Tuesday and Thursday at 5pm_
* _Once trained, make calls every day of the week!_

| [VIEW ALL PHONE BANKS](https://Allisonrusso.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8a3818e62f1e6e7a398f3ef29&id=474d21c996&e=400a181d5a)
---
## _Write Letters to Neighbors:_
Research shows that neighbor-to-neighbor conversations are some of the most impactful political conversations you can have. The campaign can pay for flashy mailers and TV commercials, but [**only YOU can help us send a letter to your folks.**](https://Allisonrusso.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8a3818e62f1e6e7a398f3ef29&id=72787bd060&e=400a181d5a) We'll ask you to write a short note on each letter, and to hand-address each envelope to our targeted voter list. This, along with a return address folks can recognize, makes a huge difference.
_Letters should be mailed no later than October 25th_
| [VIEW TEMPLATE LETTER AND SIGN UP](https://Allisonrusso.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8a3818e62f1e6e7a398f3ef29&id=4812f02eca&e=400a181d5a)
---
|

Trainings are Sunday at 4pm and Tuesday at 6pm Once trained, make calls every day of the week! Trainings are Monday and Wednesday at 6pm Once trained, make calls every day of the week! Trainings are Tuesday and Thursday at 5pm * Once trained, make calls every day of the week! | Write Letters to Neighbors: Research shows that neighbor-to-neighbor conversations are some of the most impactful political conversations you can have. Friend I know that keeping Ohio safe means backing our border patrol agents. The best way to do this is by stopping illegal immigrants from ever stepping foot on U.S. soil. That’s why I was the first elected official in Ohio to endorse President Trump and his plan to build the wall.
| [ ](http://email.m.jimrenacci.com/c/eJyNUM2OgyAYfBq8YfBDUQ8etu32NQjyU9kIGsQ2fftFl-xhT5uQL2HmY4YZNbCxV6ywAxCoKlKxqqeMtGVVdpcrtFdSXdhnTyhQVBNXflkXtBdS2lIurpiGVhnSGG0aOYpaNFQRIplmVWdGORqti3mYYlw3RD8Q3NPZtNyDLl_WB60OkYRlSWyWgB_LUwe_hGM1Cq_wy8YJj0tQOuBVxLDMiN736LjTyu4O0Zt2ws4I2AFuyx6kTqCXMxduna15Z0qmq7APn8gctsHH4CkUz1_gp-fGD1MeJ81_jHk2zkKLj9rHHxNcP-Xk4N41faK5n61KxB9wO8G-VmCqvsUjayWumepwBx3DBvqmo1TUnZBFGNT6svNsN9amyh9HtrPrHGZA7QUB7HuSBDhrhf8IH8twTTO-V_37MouWuUJA7e0bBBumPQ)
---
| | I also know that border patrol agents will continue to be overwhelmed as long as the swamp in Washington incentivizes illegal immigrantion.

As a congressman, I fought against providing amnesty, benefits, or a pathway to citizenship for illegal immigrants.

DeWine may say he supports the border patrol, but I’ve got the track record to prove it.

If you’re ready to elect a governor that will back our border patrol agents, then consider donating today.
---

name: Trump News HQ
subject: You can help restore hope in our country
body:
You may be discouraged by the Left’s dominance in our colleges and universities
_Sponsored message_
| | | This sponsored message from Trump Train News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zr9su6sqoc8lepp3a28v13e7c4qrfdr61745i2fo_rp22sh2s8i66pj1c5h6eo34c1h2bs) Fellow American, [](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zv8is59klb9iolsdp6mjkfp70jju952kpj10rgjo_rp22sh2s8i66pj1c5h6eo34c1h2bs) You may be discouraged by the Left’s dominance in our colleges and universities, and its increasing influence in K-12 education. But we must not lose hope. Instead, we must fight back with the truth. Hillsdale College has been engaging the Left on the battlefield of education from the beginning. That’s why we’ve turned our course, [**“The Great American Story: A Land of Hope”**](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z0nq3dp8jcfcgbtkp2nmuik60m7967degntqh62g_rp22sh2s8i66pj1c5h6eo34c1h2bs) into a DVD set, and I’d like you to have a copy. Taught by historian Wilfred McClay and based on his recently published history of America, **“The Great American Story: A Land of Hope”** presents a full, unbiased account of America’s past. Hillsdale’s goal in producing this course is to **restore the kind of intelligent patriotism—especially among our young people—that is essential to preserving free government.** **“The Great American Story: A Land of Hope”** is a powerful counterweight to _The New York Times’_ “1619 Project,” which is injecting the idea that America is an essentially unjust nation into the curricula of America’s K-12 schools. Please consider getting [**“The Great American Story: A Land of Hope”**](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zho7hg7jc1mru6d9q9360bg0tabc4585fo1imla0_rp22sh2s8i66pj1c5h6eo34c1h2bs) as a DVD set for your home library or to give as a gift. Presenting real American history is the surest means of preserving liberty. Quantities are limited, so reserve your copy today. [**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-great-american-story-dvd**](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zdadqq1d2b6490ino01dmrt218v54us76qm42o00_rp22sh2s8i66pj1c5h6eo34c1h2bs) Thank you for your partnership with Hillsdale College and your support of its mission on behalf of liberty. Sincerely, Bill Gray Associate Vice President of National Donor Outreach Hillsdale College
---
Hillsdale College 33 East College Street Hillsdale, MI 49242 USA

---

Trump Train News

625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

[Click here to unsubscribe](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z4m170qupd23p5qt74ktnupllh1litvtp3ooka6g_)

[](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z3gp4fvct9j1e6gmv709351s08eisacv819i0ahg_rp22sh2s8i66pj1c5h6eo34c1h238h5e8he49h666qbcdli6uon49fg)

name: American Update
subject: Your invitation to learn
body:
The events of the last year have no precedent in our nation’s history. [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c8820%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=XyqTZmuEtDJpd1AVv9vXFw&sysid=1)
This sponsored message from American Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c15349%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=7sy3935OKnB9W8QV5Ey9ng&sysid=1) Dear Fellow American,
The events of the last year have no precedent in our nation’s history. They’ve shaken me, and I’m sure they’ve affected you as well.
Throughout it all, you may have noticed a recurring theme from the progressives in the media, Big Tech, and politics. They insist that the government designed by our Founding Fathers, as expressed in the Constitution, is **flawed** and **outdated** --not adequate for the challenges of our time.
How should defenders of the Constitution, like you and me, respond to such charges?
Well, a few early champions of the Constitution--Alexander Hamilton, John Jay, and James Madison--have given you the guide: _The Federalist Papers_.
Written between October 1787 and August 1788 under the pen name Publius, _The Federalist Papers_ were originally published as newspaper editorials intended to explain the merits of the Constitution.
Thomas Jefferson described _The Federalist Papers_ as “the best commentary on the principles of government which ever was written.”
That means that defenders of the Constitution have no better help in understanding the principles of liberty underlying our Constitution than the words of the Founders themselves.
**So, I’d like to send you our entire 10-lesson course, “ _The Federalist Papers_ ,”on DVD today with a donation of $100 or more to Hillsdale College.**
_**“The Federalist Papers”**_ course comes in a beautiful DVD box set for viewing in your home or a small group. You might also find it useful for a homeschool curriculum or personal study. It’s taught by Hillsdale’s knowledgeable faculty and will deepen your understanding of this incredibly relevant document even more.
The DVD can also make an excellent gift for a friend or family member unfamiliar with our nation’s founding principles of liberty. [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c15340%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=US2yULTpTlztIPwlUdGldQ&sysid=1) Supplies are limited, though, so get this special edition of **_“The Federalist Papers”_** on DVD today. Given that more than 200,000 people have taken this course already, you can bet the DVD box set won’t last long.
Click here to learn more about this DVD and order your copy of _**“The Federalist Papers”**_ today: [**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-federalist-papers**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c15341%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=cyXDu0Cby8jBdqEr3FxxMQ&sysid=1)
Warm regards,
Bill Gray
Class of 2001
Associate Vice President of National Donor Outreach
Hillsdale College
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_
_[Unsubscribe](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/OptOut.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c8820%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=XyqTZmuEtDJpd1AVv9vXFw&sysid=1)_

body:
Just a few short hours to go... |

It’s the weekend. So I’ll keep this quick. Our mid-month fundraising deadline is midnight tonight and my team tells me we’re coming up dangerously short. If our team members, like you, don’t pitch in during these final hours, we’ll fall behind in our fundraising, I’ll become vulnerable to the national GOP fundraising machine, and our 50-50 Senate majority will be in danger. Look, asking for your hard-earned dollar is my least favorite part of this job. But I’m turning down large donations from corporate PACs and federal lobbyists and I’ve been focusing on reducing child poverty and getting historic investments for our infrastructure nationwide. Your support drives this campaign and it drives my work in Washington. Any donation you can give today will make a difference so that I can continue fighting for Coloradans in the Senate in the years to come. **Please chip in $10 — or however much fits your budget — before midnight tonight to help me keep Colorado blue and continue fighting for Colorado values in the Senate.** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | **[Donate $10 now](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37618636/311878852/1929152467?express_lane=true&amount=10&&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&employer=&occupation=&refcode=AU_MFB_FR_GEN_MMG_AC_20211016_PM2_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhYzNlZDYzNS1kZDJlLWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rvuVHfCwcMZKTk1kdOhsbnVpqyyU5ZT9YanKtGqF-Fc=)**

clean_body: Just a few short hours to go... | = It’s the weekend. So I’ll keep this quick. Our mid-month fundraising deadline is midnight tonight and my team tells me we’re coming up dangerously short. If our team members, like you, don’t pitch in during these final hours, we’ll fall behind in our fundraising, I’ll become vulnerable to the national GOP fundraising machine, and our 50-50 Senate majority will be in danger. Look, asking for your hard-earned dollar is my least favorite part of this job. But I’m turning down large donations from corporate PACs and federal lobbyists and I’ve been focusing on reducing child poverty and getting historic investments for our infrastructure nationwide. Your support drives this campaign and it drives my work in Washington. Any donation you can give today will make a difference so that I can continue fighting for Coloradans in the Senate in the years to come. Please chip in $10 — or however much fits your budget — before midnight tonight to help me keep Colorado blue and continue fighting for Colorado values in the Senate. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = ** | = | | = | = | | = | = Thank you, Michael Bennet for Colorado PO Box 3078 Denver, CO 80201 United States | mailto:info@michaelbennet.com | Paid for by Bennet for Colorado ** By clicking the links above, you certify that you are responsible for paying all charges incurred in using the debit or credit card to be charged, and that your personal funds will be the true source of the contribution.

clean_body: We can’t be the reason Pelosi keeps her majority... | Peter, I need your help right away. There are only a few hours left until the October mid-month deadline, and we’re facing a $7,020 deficit. If we come up short, all the momentum we’ve built over the past few months will vanish, and Pelosi will be able to buy this seat out from under us -- completely destroying our chances of winning back the House. We can’t be the reason Pelosi keeps her majority. I’m counting on YOU to step up at this pivotal moment. Thank you, Maria Elvira Salazar Florida's 27th Congressional District \- - - - Forwarded Message - - - - From: Maria Elvira Salazar Date: Thu, Oct 14, 2021 Subject: 3-point lead To: dpwillis67@gmail.com Peter, Quinnipiac University -- a left-leaning pollster -- just released a new poll showing congressional Republicans with a 3-point lead over Democrats. Across the country, Americans are coming together to reject the Left’s radical, socialist agenda. And thanks to hundreds of conservative patriots across America we are on the verge of CRUSHING our fundraising goal by the upcoming deadline -- with your support I know we will beat our goal and Nancy Pelosi’s opposition. Right now, we’ve got the edge, but we can’t afford to get complacent. Nancy Pelosi and the Left are raking in unprecedented amounts of money -- and they’re using all that cash to go on the offensive against Republicans like me who represent swing districts. We’re going to need every last dollar in our 2021 budget to protect this seat. And unlike Pelosi and her DCCC, I can’t raise millions from wealthy donors and special interests. I depend on the support of grassroots patriots like you, Peter. Thank you, Maria Elvira Salazar Florida's 27th Congressional District Paid for by Salazar for Congress P.O. subject: Trump’s right-hand man, Steve Bannon, is trying to flip VA
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Common Good Virginia
body:
| | | [](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wtqBszT-C7glSRly-ge4miV04tp4Fy6FnycaH8AsjDGG8o5hWQjVI8rJjV1sRbjiYPjddXoYuekYX5R5tnVuKNe2NA_YXSP-Kj8R219WzgDcv045NYbuUrod2Pv7HLYH65kCpleK_3tfNTOxjYOC4wBFSQEio6wHTWF-3v8iX27CA16t61F0IJ-3vpVFIybNiXRIIxxcebrJ5KX_pcmUVXe7qOdKORBHdRPBERt6gqdIr3AOSt3VekUY_nYej4wQy72ScX8icPXd2o61d96OTv_S1qILtdlJUvhYMoj9bcmLC8GDWIjgE5D7zeJ0SWupuQf8HvVHyR_KakJHaK-ZIInB0wYfHc_ZWMnwVt1o3D-2uifTKPLD5qpF9f-tD_VG8/3g7/19fUjAHdRa22PwAAR1Ohsg/h0/pjiQEzfeqNm4C6OqwAXEb2mxL9cZQjlaI4m4Dth_mI8)
Steve Bannon -- a darling of white supremacists, who defended Trump’s “very fine people on both sides” comments on Charlottesville -- is trying to flip Virginia red.

He’s made it clear that Glenn Youngkin, Trump’s pick for governor, has fully embraced MAGA, and he even came to Virginia to campaign for the GOP ticket.

Derek, anyone who Bannon endorses is bad news.

body:
My parents came to the U.S. homeless to give me the American Dream. Now, I'm running for Congress to keep the American Dream, which saved our lives, a |
No longer want to receive emails from Rod? You may [unsubscribe here](http://links.bestamericanow.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_s=a1d75fdef7f94cbcb019ea6f09c45531&_t=hI8wPC2WOtMzmKxEbiXDq_2iJA4-RgH5l0SPjgmkFjyiZR24x58NpgqyTIiZ9QjZS4vN4_DedzR2wgj1aWexcFHPt0RLDE3jozy9c1WUQqo2SHmaURngkhHMXIANRI7TPdEgH6OeL_VUjNVpIvIi14OH8nzuBPMjUz2D1ygfWQo%3D).

[](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=a1d75fdef7f94cbcb019ea6f09c45531&_e=YpccduoNRtvjFTeTR8GWMvQL2Be9lXPxmN4NCU3O1FlzjCTDNHgh9I1ptkRpsu8-L6s0GgK3qNpL4G2Gm29H5rRY_PpsAy0JrrQ33yr1gF3a_p2YBvPDBWauOu4iiGhNlzqaNzKFW_HZgYnHP0_TmcK8AsbImxLhn5LYin41evnrNsYri2QnfHPQSnBpsEMVgD_HgZzg2qgoXU15GMdKejvmT5gtKpeBQuVWo3QNUAkb3xjwkEkPKAqsk4TfuJyZzliQWvq-uLy2X9VElFWTiF2icEfm0q1osESSDKOpnXShnxAFFBQDKCcjMLZYeZx25ZK8-SXKGXhAIdZFKrXu0JAFVE8Ni1QshZ5PUwMr8oKNnPZKZXLGPoD0vTpkvrtOUEeo3qVapXEegwVXQ5d88UcnTtcZTl15CiBbnZhCU8C9UYXicvWt_XS_o7C9xlPYjtFjOfs37oGQpChwcDWzjqCUdjLRher_b5lTpk_WHrSG_LO8Snr5fIG80rvMrKOK)

---
Peter,

Never believe the Left’s narrative that America is a racist country; that the American dream doesn’t exist anymore; or that the Constitution is a relic of the past that disproportionately benefits Anglo Americans.

I’m speaking with authority on the matter: **I’m a first generation Haitian-American whose parents came to this country, quite literally penniless, to pick crops in South Florida during the 1980s**. Now, less than forty years after my parents experienced food insecurity and homelessness, I’m running for Congress – as a Republican. **I guess you could say that I don’t fit the Left’s definition of a conservative**.

[](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=a1d75fdef7f94cbcb019ea6f09c45531&_e=YpccduoNRtvjFTeTR8GWMvQL2Be9lXPxmN4NCU3O1FlzjCTDNHgh9I1ptkRpsu8-L6s0GgK3qNpL4G2Gm29H5rRY_PpsAy0JrrQ33yr1gF3a_p2YBvPDBWauOu4iiGhNlzqaNzKFW_HZgYnHP0_TmcK8AsbImxLhn5LYin41evnrNsYri2QnfHPQSnBpsEMVgD_HgZzg2qgoXU15GMdKejvmT5gtKpeBQuVWo3QNUAkb3xjwkEkPKAqsk4TfuJyZzliQWvq-uLy2X9VElFWTiF2icEfm0q1osESSDKOpnXSvkVBby042umdILhv4jtoQJf8aJjnyr61vDyPgAhDWt7gqAzUHGzeXDrCBz4GDAFewc3kxs_9jQyENpiLJRH6TJFCkp_JIuUA_z-ZWl_gEn18pVVHkLcqnTsFlXw-yjgwqj-9Pf5kxeYWRlNwHCd5_YNUM-jQ0MvqiU7rtj9R4Upp_QnnQvTatFDwu-mqeZvL_A5dsdlTmSvUAK_oU5IP_)
My name is Rod Dorilas and I’d like to tell you a few important things about me and why I’m writing to you today.
* I’m a military veteran (**I joined at 17**),
* I’m a lawyer (**I utilized the GI bill to pay for law school**)
* I’m a former Trump Administration appointee, having held various jobs during the four years President Trump held office.

**The thing I’m most proud about? My family built our own American Dream without the help of the government, or left-wing socialist politicians. And I’m running for Congress because some folks in DC just don’t understand that the government is not going to help make individuals successful – grit, determination and personal responsibility are keys to success.**

In his 1967 inaugural address as Governor of California, Ronald Reagan said, “ _**freedom is never more than one generation away from extinction**_.” Coming from an immigrant family, I believe it’s my responsibility to fight to make sure that people in this country know how precious freedom - and the United States - truly is.

[](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=a1d75fdef7f94cbcb019ea6f09c45531&_e=YpccduoNRtvjFTeTR8GWMvQL2Be9lXPxmN4NCU3O1FlzjCTDNHgh9I1ptkRpsu8-L6s0GgK3qNpL4G2Gm29H5rRY_PpsAy0JrrQ33yr1gF3a_p2YBvPDBWauOu4iiGhNlzqaNzKFW_HZgYnHP0_TmcK8AsbImxLhn5LYin41evnrNsYri2QnfHPQSnBpsEMVgD_HgZzg2qgoXU15GMdKejvmT5gtKpeBQuVWo3QNUAkb3xjwkEkPKAqsk4TfuJyZzliQWvq-uLy2X9VElFWTiF2icEfm0q1osESSDKOpnXRuj9MyRSB8AgrISg6F-XpSP06QWiRidfWFnMZXAkGlxEt41aHSHOV8op39hH5SX9TlEWKM-hNuMIWjSYUitMUz7jqmAJlDpwv-2ixX92HUW_UmfKOwO5MvAqL9EZfpaPw8f4D9CbE5AnGD2rnHoY2xStUG-4U_4iFa3mVRHg3OxbZwq3uD2th3fsXztjI0MOsfmMQG1NISCclJK-vOwZYe)

| _**ABOUT ROD**_

Rod Dorilás is the first-generation son of two immigrants from Haiti. His father immigrated to Florida to pick crops, and eventually his parents went on to own a small business. From a young age, his parents instilled in him the importance of hard work, integrity, and service.

At age 17, Rod enlisted in the United States Navy, serving for six years as a Petty Officer Second Class and Assistant Engagement Control Officer onboard the USS The Sullivans, stationed in Jacksonville. There, he was responsible for planning and executing the deployment of Tomahawk Land Attack Missiles on the Ballistic Missile Defense destroyer.

After graduating, he served in President Trump's Administration in the U.S. Department of Commerce. While serving our great nation, Rod fought tirelessly to ensure that American families and businesses weren't taken advantage of by China.

Friend,
**This is time-sensitive.**
With what is happening across the nation, the Radical Left trying to cancel our Pro-Life views is despicable!
